1000600424.english: Ah! I can breathe! I feel alive! &n I thought you were already dead... If I had been just a little bit later, it could have been a disaster?
1000600424.korean: 아! 숨 쉰다! 살아있는 것 같아! &n벌써 죽어 버린 줄 알았는데… 조금만 늦었으면 큰일 날 뻔 했네?

1000600425.english: Griffon, speak a little more politely. You are our master.
1000600425.korean: 그리폰, 조금 더 정중하게 말하렴. 우리 주인이 되실 분이잖아.

1000600426.english: Huh, I haven't acknowledged you as my master yet? Anyway, give me that shot first. I blinked, but it felt like it was barely working.
1000600426.korean: 흥, 난 아직 주인이라고 인정 안했거든?&n어쨌든 얼른 그 주사부터 놔. 눈을 깜빡이긴 하지만 간당간당 한 것 같으니까.

1000600427.english: Are you alive? Are you blinking? You seem to be breathing properly. &n It doesn't seem like you've fully regained consciousness yet...
1000600427.korean: 살아났나? 눈을 깜빡거리는데? 숨도 제대로 쉬는 것 같아.&n아직 의식이 완전히 돌아오진 않은 것 같지만…

1000600428.english: Really? That's fortunate. &n If this person comes to his senses and gives orders, we can now...
1000600428.korean: 그래? 다행이야. &n이 분이 정신이 들어서 명령을 내려주시면 우리도 이젠…

1000600429.english: But is it really okay? &n That woman said that humans wouldn't have memories.
1000600429.korean: 그런데 정말 괜찮을까? &n그 여자가 인간이 기억이 없을 거라고 했잖아.

1000600430.english: What's the problem with not having memories?
1000600430.korean: 기억이 없는 게 무슨 문제가 될까봐?

1000600431.english: Of course! We have to fight, and if you don't remember, you have to explain everything. It could be a useless burden!
1000600431.korean: 당연하지! 우린 싸워야 하는데 기억이 없으면 뭐든지 다 설명을 해야 하잖아.&n괜히 도움도 안 되는 짐덩어리일 수도 있다고!

1000600432.english: How could that be? And even if that were the case, we need someone to give us orders. Even if it takes time, if we explain things properly, we'll somehow get it done.
1000600432.korean: 그럴 리가 있겠니? 그리고 그렇다고 하더라도 우린 명령해 주실 분이 필요해.&n시간이 걸리더라도 설명을 제대로 하면 어떻게든 될 거야.

1000600433.english: Is that so? Huh... huh? Wait, it seems like the human is awake? The human is awake, right? He's awake, right?
1000600433.korean: 그럴려나? 흐응… 응? 잠깐, 인간이 깨어난 것 같은데?&n인간, 깨어난 거지? 깨어난 거 맞지?

1000600434.english: Huh? You're talking? Hey, Constantia, is that what humans are supposed to talk about?
1000600434.korean: 어? 말을 하네? 저기 콘스탄챠, 인간이란 게 원래 말하는 거야?

1000600435.english: Words are originally spoken by humans. We just imitated them…
1000600435.korean: 말은 원래 인간님들이 하는 거야. 우리가 그걸 흉내 낸 거고…

1000600436.english: First, I need to wake you up. &n Just a moment. Human, I'll explain in a bit.
1000600436.korean: 일단 그것보다 일으켜 드려야겠어. &n잠시만요. 인간님, 설명은 조금만 있다가 드릴게요.

1000600437.english: Dear Human, before I explain, I need you to enter your name to register as a user. Could you please tell me your name?
1000600437.korean: 인간님, 설명에 앞서서 먼저 사용자 등록을 위해서 이름 입력이 필요해요.&n혹시 성함을 말씀해 주실 수 있나요?

1000600438.english: {0}, you have completed registration in the integrated database!

1000600439.english: Nice to meet you. My name is Constantia, and this is Griffon. &n Griffon, should I say hello?
1000600439.korean: 반갑습니다. 전 콘스탄챠, 그리고 이 아이는 그리폰이라고 해요. &n그리폰, 인사해야지?

1000600440.english: … Huh, let me tell you in advance, don't even think about calling me by my name and acting friendly. &n I didn't wait for humans like the other kids.
1000600440.korean: … 흥, 미리 말하지만 이름 함부로 부르면서 친한 척 할 생각은 하지마. &n난 다른 애들처럼 인간만 기다리진 않았으니까.

1000600441.english: I know you have a lot of questions, but please wait a moment. This place is very dangerous right now, so I'll go to headquarters and talk to you first…
1000600441.korean: 궁금한 게 많으실 테지만 잠시만 기다려 주세요.&n여긴 지금 많이 위험한 곳이라서 일단 본부로 가서 말씀…

1000600442.english: Constantia! I'm out! Direction is east, distance is... within 50 meters!

1000600443.english: Could it be that Ironworm is here? How did he know…
1000600443.korean: 설마, 철충이 온 거니? 어떻게 알고…

1000600444.english: Well, I don't know. There are about six of them. They're scattered around? Constantia, let's fight. Now that we have humans, we can fight.
1000600444.korean: 그야 나도 모르지. 숫자는 6마리 정도야. 흩어져 있는데?&n콘스탄챠, 싸우자. 이젠 인간도 있으니까 싸울 수 있잖아.

1000600446.english: Not yet. It's dangerous to fight Iron Claw one-on-one... &n There are only two of us.
1000600446.korean: 아직 아냐. 철충하고는 1:1로 싸워도 위험한데… &n우린 둘 뿐이잖아.

1000600447.english: Besides, a battle like this where {0} is exposed is too dangerous. &n Let's just avoid it for now. It'll be really dangerous if you get surrounded.
1000600447.korean: 게다가 이렇게 {0}님이 노출된 전투는 너무 위험해. &n일단 피하는 걸로 하자. 포위되면 정말 위험해 지니까.

1000600448.english: This time, it's the west. It seems like we're already surrounded. They'll be here any minute. &n Constantia, that guy's human. Can't you tell him to give [c][ffd130]command[-][/c]?
1000600448.korean: 이번엔 서쪽이야. 벌써 포위당한 것 같은데? 곧 여기로 들이닥칠 거야.&n콘스탄챠, 저 녀석 인간이잖아. [c][ffd130]명령[-][/c]을 내려 달라고 말하면 안돼?

1000600449.english: We've been through combat training, right? &n If we take them down one by one, we'll win, okay?
1000600449.korean: 우린 전투 훈련도 받았잖아. &n각개격파를 하면 이길 수 있을 거야. 응?

1000600451.english: Sir... {0}, I'm sorry for the inconvenience, but... &n Could you give us some orders?
1000600451.korean: 저… {0} 님, 이런 상황이라 죄송하지만…&n 저희에게 명령을 내려주실 수 있으신가요?

1000600452.english: We cannot engage in any combat without human [c][ffd130]command[-][/c].
1000600452.korean: 저희는 인간의 [c][ffd130]명령[-][/c]이 없이는 어떤 교전 행위도 할 수 없어요.

1000600453.english: {0} If you give us the order to fight, we will fight to break through the siege.
1000600453.korean: {0} 님이 저희에게 싸우라는 명령을 내려 주신다면 &n싸워서라도 포위를 돌파해 볼게요.

1000600454.english: Give me an order, [c][ffd130]Commence Battle[-][/c] or [c][ffd130]Attack![-][/c] or whatever.
1000600454.korean: [c][ffd130]전투 개시[-][/c]나 [c][ffd130]공격![-][/c]이나 아무 거나 좋으니 명령을 내려줘.

1000600455.english: What? Don't you remember Ironworm? It's urgent... What is it? It's urgent, so hurry up and listen. Constantia, give me the hologram...
1000600455.korean: 뭐? 철충도 기억 안나? 급한데… 뭐야?&n급하니까 빨리 들어. 콘스탄챠, 홀로그램 좀…

1000600456.english: Metal Parasites are mechanical parasites that grow by feeding on human-made machines. You can tell they're bad just by looking at them, right?
1000600456.korean: 철충은 인간이 만든 기계를 먹고 자라는 기계 기생충이야.&n생긴 것만 봐도 나쁜 놈들인 줄은 알겠지?

1000600457.english: These bastards are destroying humans and now they're killing us too. If we don't run away quickly, they'll kill us too.
1000600457.korean: 이 자식들이 인간들을 멸망시키고 이젠 우리까지 죽이고 있단 말야.&n빨리 도망치지 않으면 우리도 죽일 걸?

1000600458.english: Huh? You didn't know what we were? Are you a total idiot? We are…
1000600458.korean: 에? 너 우리가 뭔지 몰랐어? 완전 바보네?&n우리는…

1000600459.english: …It seems we've come this far. I don't think we have any more time. &n Please give the order to attack.
1000600459.korean: … 이 앞까지 와 버린 모양이군요. 더 이상은 시간이 없을 것 같아요.&n공격 명령을 부탁 드릴게요.

1000600460.english: Phew, now we're out of the underpass. &n Griffon, I'll ask you to explore.
1000600460.korean: 휴, 이제 지하도를 빠져나왔군요.&n그리폰, 탐색을 부탁할게.

1000600461.english: There's nothing else around here. &n After all, if you fight properly, it's nothing special.
1000600461.korean: 일단 이 근처엔 더 없어.&n역시, 제대로 싸우면 별 것도 아니잖아.

1000600462.english: Haha, yeah. I think I did pretty well for a first time. &n But don't be complacent. These Metal Parasite are low-level fighters...
1000600462.korean: 후후, 그래. 처음치곤 잘 한 것 같아. &n그래도 자만하면 안돼. 이 철충들은 하급 전투원들이니까…

1000600463.english: You know how scary high-ranking Metal Parasite are, right?
1000600463.korean: 고위 철충이 얼마나 무서운지는 너도 잘 알잖니?

1000600464.english: "More than that, Master, have you ever studied tactics? I'm amazed at how naturally you command. Don't you agree? Griffon?"
1000600464.korean: 그것보다 주인님, 혹시 전술에 대해 배우신 적이 있으신가요? &n너무 자연스럽게 지휘를 하셔서 놀랐어요. 그렇지 않니? 그리폰?

1000600465.english: Hmph… Well, it wasn’t bad. But it wasn’t really that good either. Just average, I’d say?
1000600465.korean: 흥… 뭐, 뭐 나쁘진 않았지. 그렇다고 되게 좋은 것도 아니고. 보통 정도?

1000600466.english: Shouldn't you be getting out of here sooner rather than later?
1000600466.korean: 그, 그것보다 슬슬 빠져나가야 하는 것 아냐?

1000600467.english: Yeah. I think we just need to get a communication link to headquarters and get moving. &n Just a moment…
1000600467.korean: 응. 일단 본부에 통신을 넣고 움직이면 될 것 같아. &n잠시만…

1000600468.english: Headquarters, can you hear me? This is Squad 21. Headquarters, can you connect?
1000600468.korean: 본부, 들리나요?&n여긴 21 스쿼드. 본부, 통신 연결 가능한가요?

1000600469.english: This is the Labiata prototype. 21 Squad? &n Has the mission been completed?
1000600469.korean: 여기는 라비아타 프로토타입. 21 스쿼드? &n임무는 완료한 거야?

1000600470.english: Huh? This sound... Headquarters? What's going on?
1000600470.korean: 응? 이 소리는… 본부? 무슨 일이 있나요?

1000600471.english: Ugh! No, finish the report first. That's the most important thing.
1000600471.korean: 윽! 아니, 먼저 보고부터 완료해줘. 일단, 그 일이 제일 중요하니까.

1000600472.english: Yes, Squad 21 mission complete. But, Headquarters, what's going on? What's that sound? What's going on?
1000600472.korean: 네, 21 스쿼드 임무 완료예요. 그런데 본부, 무슨 일이죠?&n그 소리는 뭐죠? 무슨 일이 있나요?

1000600473.english: First, calm down. Constantia, listen carefully. I don't know what happened, but headquarters has been discovered.
1000600473.korean: 일단, 흥분을 가라앉히고. 콘스탄챠, 잘 들으렴.&n지금 어떻게 된 일 인지는 몰라도 본부가 발각됐어.

1000600474.english: We've been under siege for several hours now. &n We've closed the bulkheads and are holding out for now... but it doesn't look like we can hold out for long.
1000600474.korean: 몇 시간 전부터 포위 공격을 받고 있는 상태야. &n일단은 격벽을 폐쇄하고 버티고 있지만... 오래 버티긴 힘들 것 같아.

1000600475.english: What? Attack? Okay. I'll be back soon. Just wait a moment.
1000600475.korean: 뭐? 공격? 알았어. 금방 돌아갈게. 조금만 기다려줘.

1000600476.english: Hold on, Griffon. 21 Squad has a new mission.
1000600476.korean: 잠깐만, 그리폰, 기다리렴. 21 스쿼드에 새로운 임무가 있어.

1000600477.english: What's the mission? The headquarters is in danger... We found our humans. &n I'm the commander, so all I have to do is give you orders.
1000600477.korean: 임무는 무슨… 본부가 위험한데… 우리 인간을 찾았어. &n사령관이 돼서 너희한테 명령만 내리면 되잖아.

1000600478.english: It's too dangerous here. There are so many Metal Parasites that even if all the personnel in headquarters fight, they won't be able to stop them.
1000600478.korean: 여긴 너무 위험해.&n철충 숫자가 너무 많아서 본부의 모든 인원이 싸워도 막을 수 없을 거야.

1000600479.english: Besides… I think that guy came in person.
1000600479.korean: 게다가… 아무래도 그 녀석이 직접 온 것 같아.

1000600480.english: That guy? Could it be… a stalker? I'll go now. This time, I'm really going to finish him off!
1000600480.korean: 그 녀석? 설마… 스토커?&n지금 갈게. 이번엔 정말 끝장낼 거야!

1000600481.english: No! If you come now, you'll be in danger too. &n This is an order. Griffon, wait there. I'll give Constantia new instructions.
1000600481.korean: 안돼! 지금 오면 너희들까지 위험해 질 거야.&n명령이야. 그리폰, 거기서 대기해. 콘스탄챠에게 새로운 지령을 내릴 테니.

1000600483.english: I'll give you a new order. Constantia? Are you listening?

1000600485.english: Our last hope now is a new commander. There's no need to return to headquarters. We plan to abandon the base and retreat.
1000600485.korean: 지금 우리한테 남은 마지막 희망은 새로운 사령관 님이야.&n본부로 돌아올 필요는 없어. 기지를 버리고 퇴각할 생각이니까.

1000600486.english: We need to protect the Commander and establish a new base in a safe place. Can you do it?
1000600486.korean: 사령관 님을 지켜서 안전한 곳에 새로운 기지를 마련해야 해. 할 수 있겠어?

1000600487.english: … Yes. But, Sister, where should we go…
1000600487.korean: … 네. 하지만, 언니, 어디로 가야 할 지는…

1000600488.english: I sent Johanna before we were completely surrounded by enemies, so listen to her for detailed instructions.
1000600488.korean: 적들에게 완전히 포위되기 전에 요안나를 파견했으니 &n그 아이에게 자세한 지령을 들으렴.

1000600489.english: I'll mark the location on the map. Just follow the navigation. Be careful, and be sure to protect the Commander.
1000600489.korean: 위치는 지도에 표시해 놓을게. 내비게이션을 따라가면 될 거야.&n조심하고, 사령관님을 꼭 지켜야 해.

1000600490.english: Yes, Sister. I'll protect the Commander. And... &n Sister, be careful too.
1000600490.korean: 네. 언니. 사령관님은 제가 지킬게요. 그리고…&n언니도 조심하세요.

1000600491.english: According to the coordinates my sister gave me... it should be around here... &n Ah! Master. There she is. It's Ms. Johanna.
1000600491.korean: 언니가 말해준 좌표대로라면… 이 근처일 텐데… &n아! 주인님. 저기 있군요. 요안나 씨에요.

1000600492.english: Miss Constantia? I was waiting under the orders of the Duke of Labiata.
1000600492.korean: 콘스탄챠 양? 라비아타 공의 명령을 받고 기다리고 있었다네.

1000600493.english: And this is our new master. &n Hail to Johanna, the Queen of Priests, the last remaining great one.
1000600493.korean: 그리고 이 분이 바로 우리의 새로운 주군인가보군.&n이 사제들의 여왕 요안나, 마지막 남은 위대한 분에게 경의를 바치노라.

1000600494.english: We, too, can't hide our joy. However, there are more pressing matters, so please forgive us for not being able to express my joy in poetry.
1000600494.korean: 짐 역시, 기쁨을 감출 수 없군. 하지만, 그보다 더 급한 일이 있으니 &n이 기쁨을 시로 표현하지 못하는 걸 부디 용서하게나.

1000600495.english: This is the story of the instructions my sister gave me.

1000600496.english: Hmm! Your sister, Lady Labiata, spoke of an abandoned submarine not far from here.
1000600496.korean: 음! 그대의 자매, 라비아타 공은 여기서 멀지 않은 곳에 있는 &n버려진 잠수함에 관해서 이야기했다네.

1000600497.english: It was built in the past for tourism purposes and is said to still be in operation.
1000600497.korean: 과거에 관광을 위해 만들어진 것으로 아직도 작동을 한다고 하더군.

1000600498.english: It can go into the deep sea quite deep and is strong as it is made for deep sea use... It is the perfect fit to fight the Metal Parasites that hate water.
1000600498.korean: 꽤나 깊은 바다 속까지 들어갈 수 있고 심해용이라 튼튼하기도 하다니...&n물을 싫어하는 철충과 싸우기에는 그야말로 적격이지.

1000600499.english: The location is detailed with the luggage.

1000600500.english: …is it a submarine? To avoid being noticed... &n I understand. Are there any other instructions?
1000600500.korean: … 잠수함인가요? 눈을 피하기 위해서군요...&n알겠어요. 그 외에 다른 지령은 없나요?

1000600501.english: Other than that, it was just a matter of being careful as enemies may be guarding the path you take.
1000600501.korean: 그 외에는 가는 길을 적이 지키고 있을 수 있으니 &n주의를 하는 게 좋을 거란 말 정도였네.

1000600502.english: I see. Then I think it would be best to depart immediately before more enemies gather. &n If it is alright with you, Master, I will depart.
1000600502.korean: 그렇군요. 그럼 적들이 더 모이기 전에 바로 출발하는 게 좋을 것 같네요.&n주인님, 괜찮으시면 출발을 할게요.

1000600503.english: Unlike me, who is for home security, or Griffon, who is for military use, Johanna is an android created for broadcasting.
1000600503.korean: 가정 경비용인 저나, 군사용인 그리폰과는 달리 &n요안나 씨는 방송용으로 만들어진 안드로이드니까요.

1000600504.english: For the sake of good performance, her speech and training… were given a more classical flair.
1000600504.korean: 좋은 연기를 위해서 말투나 교육을 좀… 고풍스럽게 받으셨어요.

1000600505.english: As the saying goes, We are a queen who has returned to show the people of the present the glory of the past.&n We ask for your understanding even if Our actions and speech are unfamiliar to you, my lord.
1000600505.korean: 그 말대로, 짐은 과거의 영광을 현세인들에게 보여주기 위해 돌아온 여왕.&n짐의 행동과 말투가 주군에게 익숙치 않더라도 양해를 구하네.

1000600506.english: Tch, there's no end to this, is there? It's going to be difficult this way. &n I'm sure I can get through it, but it's going to take too much time, right?
1000600506.korean: 칫, 이대론 끝이 없겠는데? 아무래도 이쪽 길로는 힘들겠어. &n못 뚫을 거야 없지만 시간이 너무 걸릴 것 같은데?

1000600507.english: I agree. Even if we were to say so, Master would be in danger even from a small attack. Besides, it's night... and the temperature will drop...
1000600507.korean: 내 생각도 같아. 우리야 그렇다고 해도 주인님은 작은 공격에도 위험하니까.&n게다가 밤이라… 기온도 내려갈 테고…

1000600508.english: Ah! Maybe it would be better to just fly away... &n I could even fly while carrying at least one person... One by one...
1000600508.korean: 아! 차라리 날아가 버리는 게 나을 지도... &n한 명 정도는 안고 날 수도 있으니까… 차례차례…

1000600509.english: … You want to fly while holding your master? No. It'll be more dangerous if you get hit by anti-aircraft fire!
1000600509.korean: … 주인님을 안고 날고 싶은 거야?&n안돼. 대공 사격이라도 당하면 더 위험해!

1000600510.english: Who, who are you talking about hugging whom? I'm just saying it could happen, not that I intend to do it. Fine... I'll just look for the path down there one more time.
1000600510.korean: 누, 누가 누굴 안는단 거야? 그럴 수도 있단 거지 그렇게 하겠단 게 아니잖아.&n그래… 차라리 아래쪽 길을 한 번 더 찾아 볼게.

1000600511.english: … Just in case… yeah. Anyway, could you scout the path down the mountain? Find a way that is at least a little safe.
1000600511.korean: … 혹시라도… 그래. 어쨌든 산 아래 쪽의 길을 좀 정찰해 줄래?&n조금이라도 안전한 길을 찾아줘.

1000600512.english: … You’re making a strange face… Alright. I’ll find a path that isn’t difficult for humans either…
1000600512.korean: … 이상한 표정을 짓네… 알았어. &n인간도 힘들지 않은 길을 찾아 줄 테니까…

1000600513.english: Don't get the wrong idea. It's because I need you to fight, you know?
1000600513.korean: 착각하지마. &n네가 있어야 싸울 수 있으니까 그런 거거든?

1000600514.english: I'll be right there. I'll come back once I find my way...
1000600514.korean: 난 바로 갈게. 길을 찾으면 올 테니까…

1000600515.english: Master, I think it would be best if we hid and observed the situation until the griffon finds a safe path.
1000600515.korean: 주인님, 우린 숨어서 상황을 지켜보도록 하는 게 좋을 것 같아요.&n그리폰이 안전한 길을 찾아올 때까지.

1000600516.english: Do you think I’d actually like it if someone said that? Hmph, then just wait here.
1000600516.korean: 누가 그렇게 말하면 좋아하기라도 할 것 같아?&n흥, 그럼 여기서 기다리고 있어.

1000600517.english: I'll find a safe way and come back soon...
1000600517.korean: 내가 빨리 안전한 길을 찾아 올 테니까…

1000600518.english: How was it? Was there a safe path down below?

1000600519.english: There aren't any. There aren't any. The lower area is swarming with Iron Bugs. I think it would be better to go to the top of the mountain, even if it's tough.
1000600519.korean: 없어. 없어. 아래쪽은 철충들이 드글드글해.&n차라리 힘들어도 산 위쪽으로 가는 게 더 나을 것 같아.

1000600520.english: Is that the only way? It's already getting too dark, so the mountain path seems dangerous...
1000600520.korean: 그 방법 밖엔 없을까? &n벌써 너무 어두워져서 산길은 위험할 것 같은데…

1000600521.english: It's okay. It's okay. There was a lighthouse on the mountain. And the lights were on in the tunnel leading up there, too…
1000600521.korean: 괜찮아. 괜찮아. 산 위에 등대가 하나 있더라고.&n거기로 올라가는 터널에도 불이 들어와 있고…

1000600522.english: Huh? Wait a minute, if it's the way to the lighthouse... Griffon, was the lighthouse lit up by any chance?
1000600522.korean: 응? 잠깐만, 등대 길이라면… &n그리폰, 혹시 등대에도 불이 들어와 있었니?

1000600523.english: They were inside, weren't they? The Iron蟲 are just surrounding us from below, too. It doesn't look like they came all the way to the lighthouse.
1000600523.korean: 들어와 있던데? 철충도 아래쪽에서 우릴 포위만 하고 있으니까.&n딱히 등대까진 오진 않은 것 같고.

1000600524.english: But it was strange. I wondered if the electricity wasn't coming on properly. The light was flickering oddly.
1000600524.korean: 그런데 이상하긴 했어. &n전기가 제대로 안 들어오는 건지. 빛이 이상하게 깜빡 거리고 있었거든.

1000600525.english: You mean the light flickered? As expected… Griffon, do you happen to know which direction it is? Can we see it from here?
1000600525.korean: 빛이 깜빡 거렸단 말이지? 역시…&n그리폰, 혹시 어느 방향인지 알아? 여기서 볼 수 있어?

1000600526.english: Yeah, since it's at the top of the lighthouse... if you go up over there, you'll see it. Over there... a blinking light. But why?
1000600526.korean: 응, 등대 꼭대기니까… 저쪽으로 올라가면 보일 거야. 저기… 깜빡 거리는 빛.&n그런데 왜?

1000600528.english: As expected… I was right. Master, I think we have found our way. Let's go.
1000600528.korean: 역시… 내 생각이 맞았어. 주인님, 갈 길을 찾은 것 같아요.&n출발 하시죠.

1000600530.english: Who, who are you? If you want to climb my Darkness Tower, reveal your identity!
1000600530.korean: 누, 누구냐? 이 몸의 다크니스 타워에 올라오고 싶다면 정체를 밝혀라!

1000600531.english: Long time no see. LRL, have you been doing well? I'm glad to hear you made it out of headquarters safely.
1000600531.korean: 오랜만이네. LRL, 잘 지냈어?&n본부에서 무사히 빠져 나온 것 같아 다행이야.

1000600532.english: LRL? Hey! How dare you casually use my worldly name… My true name is Cyclops Princess! the one with eyes shining like gold…
1000600532.korean: LRL? 이씨! 내 세속의 이름을 함부로 부르다니…&n이 몸의 진명은 싸이클롭스 프린세스… 황금으로 빛나는 눈을 가진…

1000600533.english: What are you talking about, mobile biological lighthouse? You managed to escape from headquarters?
1000600533.korean: 이동형 생체 등대가 뭐라는 거야? 용케 본부에서 도망쳐 나왔네?

1000600534.english: Ugh, aren't you the assailant who tormented me before I awakened to my true identity? Running away is not a word that suits me. I am…
1000600534.korean: 윽, 넌 내가 진정한 내 정체를 눈뜨기 전의 나를 괴롭히던 괴한이 아니더냐?&n도망은 내게 어울리지 않는 말. 이 몸은…

1000600535.english: … If you don't tell me exactly when you came here, you'll get beaten.
1000600535.korean: … 언제 여기 왔는지 똑바로 말 안하면 맞는다.

1000600538.english: Heehee… Labiata told me to go up to a high place and hide because I walk slowly.
1000600538.korean: 히잉… &n라비아타가 난 걸음이 느리니까 미리 높은 곳으로 올라가서 숨어 있으랬어.

1000600539.english: So that's why you were hiding in the old lighthouse. Good job. Sending Morse code was a clever idea.
1000600539.korean: 그래서 예전에 있던 등대에 숨어 있었구나.&n잘했어. 모르스 부호를 보낸 건. 영리한 생각이었어.

1000600540.english: Hoo. Hoo. Hoo. It must be hard for you common folk to comprehend the intelligence of a being who’s lived for thousands of years! More than that, you’ve done well to decode my Akashic Signal.
1000600540.korean: 후. 후. 후. 수천 년을 살아온 이 몸의 지성을 너희 우민들이 짐작하긴 힘들겠지.&n그것보다 나의 아카식 시그널을 해석하다니 제법이구나.

1000600541.english: Huh? Akashic? Do you still read weird old books by yourself these days?
1000600541.korean: 하아? 아카식? &n너 요즘도 혼자서 이상한 옛날 책 읽고 그러니?

1000600542.english: Hey! It's not a weird book, okay? It used to be super popular back in the day!
1000600542.korean: 이씨! 이상한 책 아니거든? 옛날엔 완전 인기 있었던 책이거든?

1000600543.english: "Kids, stop it. The Master is here, you know. First, let's introduce ourselves. Master, this is LRL, the lighthouse guard android."
1000600543.korean: 얘들아, 그만 하렴. 주인님도 계시잖니. 일단, 인사부터 드리자.&n주인님, 이 아이는 등대 경비용 안드로이드 LRL이에요.

1000600544.english: I hate that name. Call me Cyclops. By the way, Master? Huh? Come to think of it... you look a bit different. Are you human?
1000600544.korean: 그 이름 싫거든? 싸이클롭스라고 불러.&n그런데 주인님? 응? 그러고보니… 좀 다르게 생겼네? 혹시 인간이야?

1000600545.english: Wow! First time seeing this! That means…

1000600546.english: Hahaha... I guess I'll finally get a human familiar.
1000600546.korean: 크크크… 이제야 인간의 권속을 얻게 되겠군.

1000600547.english: LRL, you need to greet properly.

1000600548.english: … Nice to meet you. My name is Cyclops Princess. Kukuku... Happy now?

1000600549.english: Except for Seeing. And the name is LRL, you know. Anyway, now that she's joined, it'll be a bit easier from now on.
1000600549.korean: 씨잉은 빼고. 그리고 이름 LRL이잖아.&n어쨌든 얘도 합류했으니 이제부턴 좀 쉬울 거야.

1000600550.english: She used to work at this lighthouse, so she knows all about this tunnel.
1000600550.korean: 원래 이 등대에서 근무하던 애라서 이쪽 터널은 다 알고 있거든.

1000600551.english: LRL, where is the path with the fewest Iron Bugs around here? It would be even better if there were none at all.
1000600551.korean: LRL, 여기 철충이 제일 적은 길이 어디야? &n아예 없는 길이면 더 좋고.

1000600552.english: … Follow me. I’ve already picked out the way. I’m scared to go alone… No, I just looked it out in case you get bored, so there probably won’t be many Iron Bugs.
1000600552.korean: … 따라와. 길은 봐뒀어.&n혼자가기 무서… 아니, 심심할 까봐 봐둔 길이니까 철충은 거의 없을 거야.

1000600553.english: You're talking about this when you mention the submarine, right?
1000600553.korean: 그 잠수함이라는 게 이걸 이야기하는 거 맞지?

1000600554.english: Hmm? It's actually quite a bit bigger than I thought. Human, you must be feeling great to have such a big belly?
1000600554.korean: 흐응? 생각보다 꽤 크잖아? 인간, 기분 좋겠네?&n이런 큰 배를 가지게 되서?

1000600555.english: The paint is chipped a bit, but I don't think it will be a big problem. That's a relief. The Iron蟲 won't be able to chase us anymore.
1000600555.korean: 좀 도장이 벗겨지긴 했지만, 큰 문제는 없을 것 같아요.&n다행이네요. 이제 철충은 우릴 쫓아오지 못할 거예요.

1000600556.english: Yes… they said it was used at the Ocean Park that used to be here. Taking a submarine to look at the seabed…
1000600556.korean: 네… 예전 이곳에 있던 오션파크에서 쓰던 것이라고 했어요.&n잠수함을 타고 바다 밑을 구경하는…

1000600557.english: I don't think that's what you're asking. You have good eyesight, human? That's right. This is a modified military Okus-class submarine.
1000600557.korean: 그걸 묻는 게 아닌 것 같은데? 눈이 좋은데 인간?&n맞아. 이건 군용 오쿠스 급 잠수함을 개조한 거야.

1000600558.english: If we hide deep in the sea, no Iron Bug will be able to find us, right? We were lucky. To think we found something like this...
1000600558.korean: 깊은 바다 속으로 숨으면 어떤 철충도 우릴 찾지 못할 걸?&n운이 좋았어. 이런 걸 찾아 내다니…

1000600559.english: Deep sea… abyss… what foolish words that do not know that terror. Hehe, then again, humans probably cannot understand that cosmic horror.
1000600559.korean: 깊은 바다… 심연… 그 공포를 모르는 어리석은 말이군.&n후후, 하긴 인간이 그 코즈믹 호러블한 느낌을 이해할 수는 없겠지.

1000600560.english: What did you say? What's Cosmic Horrible again?

1000600561.english: It performs better than that, and you can see fish and explore the seabed, so it’s good in many ways.
1000600561.korean: 그런 거보다 성능도 좋은데다 물고기도 볼 수 있고 바다 밑 구경도 하고 &n여러가지로 괜찮단 거지..

1000600562.english: Griffon, you look like you're actually looking forward to this.

1000600563.english: Who are you expecting that? That kind of thing is just a hassle. Anyway... if the Iron蟲 can't chase us, there are various benefits...
1000600563.korean: 누가 기대한다는 거야? 그런 거 귀찮기만 하거든?&n어쨌든… 철충이 우릴 쫓지 못하면 여러 가지 이득이 있으니까…

1000600564.english: You didn’t know that? It’s because the Metal Parasites hate the sea. Their bodies are entirely made of metal, so they absolutely loathe seawater.
1000600564.korean: 그런 것도 몰라? 철충이 바다를 싫어하니까 그렇지.&n걔들은 몸이 전부 금속이라서 바닷물을 끔찍하게 싫어한다고.

1000600565.english: Or maybe it just doesn’t like it. How should I know? … Anyway, isn’t it more important that we found a place to rest for now? I’m really tired.
1000600565.korean: 아니면, 그냥 싫은 걸 수도 있지 뭐. 내가 그걸 어떻게 알아?&n… 어쨌든 일단 쉴 곳을 찾았다는 게 중요한 거 아니겠어? 지금 엄청 피곤해.

1000600566.english: For now, let's go inside. As Griffon said, everyone is in a tough situation, so I think it would be best to rest for a while and recover.
1000600566.korean: 일단, 안으로 들어가 보죠.&n그리폰 말처럼 모두 힘든 상황이니 잠시 쉬어서 회복을 하는 게 좋을 것 같아요.

1000600567.english: Now then, I shall begin diving into the deep Abyss! Once I start diving, the Iron蟲 won't be able to catch up... Huh? What does that mean?
1000600567.korean: 자, 그럼 심연의 어비스로 잠항을 시작하겠노라!&n잠항을 시작하면 철충은 쫓아오지 못할 거… 응? 이게 무슨 소리지?

1000600569.english: I turned off the communication channel before diving... Oh, wait, I turned it back on! Anyway, suddenly communications started coming in from everywhere...
1000600569.korean: 잠항을 하기 전에 통신 채널을 껐는데… 아, 켰구나! &n어쨌든 갑자기 여기저기서 통신이 들어와서…

1000600570.english: Hahaha. The howling of various familiars is chasing us even to this abyss…
1000600570.korean: 크.크.크. 여러 권속들의 울부짖음이 이 심연까지 쫓아오는…

1000600571.english: Are you kidding me? Constantia, I think that's a distress signal. It's not our way... it's the AGS way.
1000600571.korean: 농담할 때냐? 콘스탄챠, 이거 아무래도 구조 신호인 것 같은데?&n우리 쪽은 아니고… AGS 쪽이야.

1000600572.english: AGS is a group of AI automated machines that fights against Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) separately from us. But I heard that the AGS were almost completely wiped out.
1000600572.korean: AGS는 우리와는 별개로 싸우는 철충과 싸우는 AI 자동 기계 집단이에요. &n그런데 AGS는 거의 전멸했다고 들었는데.

1000600573.english: Human, what should I do? The AGS are kind of ambiguous—it's hard to call them allies... or enemies... Should I go rescue them?
1000600573.korean: 인간, 어떻게 해야 해? AGS는 아군이라고 하기에도… &n적군이라고 하기에도 미묘한 애들이라서… 구하러 가는 게 좋을까?

1000600574.english: Huh? You're leaving? Why? Commander, are you really leaving? Really? Constantia, what's going to happen?
1000600574.korean: 응? 나간다고? 어째서? &n사령관, 진짜 나가? 정말로? 콘스탄챠, 어떻게 되는 거야?

1000600575.english: I think it would be best to rescue them for now. We aren't exactly close with the AGS, but at least they are the only force fighting the Iron蟲 besides us...
1000600575.korean: 일단은 구하는 게 좋을 것 같아요. 우리가 AGS와 친하진 않지만 &n적어도 우리 말고 철충과 싸우고 있는 세력은 거기 밖에 없으니…

1000600576.english: I think it would be a good idea to follow the signal for now.
1000600576.korean: 일단 신호를 따라가 보는 게 좋을 것 같아요.

1000600577.english: Did you decide right away? Do I not need to think about it anymore?
1000600577.korean: 바로 결정 한 거야? 더 생각 안해도 돼?

1000600578.english: You're surprisingly decisive... Alright. I'll get it ready right away.
1000600578.korean: 은근히 결단력 있네… 알았어. 바로 준비할게.

1000600580.english: Okay. Then I will get ready and depart right away. I will make sure to have the communication console ready so that we can connect when we encounter the enemy.
1000600580.korean: 네. 그럼 바로 준비를 하고 출발할게요.&n적과 조우할 때, 통신 콘솔로 연결할 수 있도록 준비해 놓겠습니다.

1000600581.english: Master, I have eliminated all the Iron蟲 and arrived at the signal source. Now, I will open the gate and enter.
1000600581.korean: 주인님, 철충들을 모두 제거하고 신호 발생지에 도착했어요.&n이제 문을 열고 돌입할게요.

1000600582.english: Are the AGS guys over there? Open the door. We've come to rescue you.
1000600582.korean: 거기 AGS들 있지?&n문 열어. 구하러 왔으니까.

1000600583.english: Verifying user identity. Iron蟲 infection reaction … None! Identity confirmed… Bioroid. Criminal record… None.
1000600583.korean: 사용자의 신원을 확인합니다.&n철충 감염 반응 … 없음! 신원 확인…바이오로이드. 범죄 기록… 없음.

1000600584.english: We provide police services that are always with you, upright citizens and Bio-roids. How can we help you?
1000600584.korean: 건전한 시민과 바이오로이드 여러분께 언제나 함께하는 경찰 서비스를 &n제공합니다. 무엇을 도와드릴까요?

1000600585.english: Huh? Idiot? You guys are the ones who asked for help. Anyway, it's a relief that you're safe.
1000600585.korean: 하아? 바보? 도움은 너희들이 요청한 거잖아.&n어쨌든 무사해서 다행이긴 하네.

1000600586.english: Search rescue request approval records… Verified. Requests delivery to an authorized human or AGS high-level entity.
1000600586.korean: 구조 요청 승인 기록 검색… 확인됨.&n권한을 가진 인간 또는 AGS 고위 개체에 인도를 요청합니다.

1000600587.english: Can I take this one? That's a bit strange. Is it broken?
1000600587.korean: 얘 데리고 가도 돼? 좀, 이상한데?&n고장난 거 아냐?

1000600588.english: It's probably because the Pupp Head model is an early AI and a police model. Anyway, let's take it to Master. Since it's a machine used by the police, it will definitely be helpful.
1000600588.korean: 아마 펍 헤드 모델이 좀 초기형 AI고 경찰 모델이라서 그럴 거야.&n어쨌든 주인님께 데리고 가자. 경찰에서 쓰던 기계니 분명히 도움이 될 거야.

1000600589.english: Master, I report the completion of the operation. I request the return of Squad Constantia and the three others.
1000600589.korean: 주인님, 작전 종료를 보고합니다.&n21스쿼드 콘스탄챠 및 3명은 귀환을 요청드려요.

1000600590.english: … In the end, we only managed to get one AGS.

1000600591.english: There are various types of AGS. You can think of this Pupp Head as a small AGS. If you would like to see other AGSs…
1000600591.korean: AGS의 종류는 다양해요. 이 펍 헤드는 소형 AGS라고 생각하시면 될 거예요.&n혹시 다른 AGS를 보시고 싶으시다면…

1000600592.korean: 권한있는 시민의 요청은 매우 타당하나 전시 긴급 조치 16호에 의거 &n군경 장비 AGS에 대한 정보 누출은 금지되어 있습니다.

1000600593.english: Are you an idiot? Where are the military units and police left right now? It's that all humans are dead...
1000600593.korean: 바보 아냐? 지금 군 부대랑 경찰이 어디 남아 있는데?&n인간이 모조리 죽어 버린 게…

1000600595.english: Ah... uh, anyway, humans, it seems like it will be difficult to communicate with AGS. We will definitely be able to meet later... so I'll just ask then.
1000600595.korean: 아… 어, 어쨌든 인간, AGS와 통신을 하긴 어려울 것 같아.&n나중에 분명히 만날 수 있을 테니… 그때 물어 보지 뭐.

1000600596.english: There are additional requests for good citizens.
1000600596.korean: 선량한 시민에게 추가 요청 사항이 있음.

1000600597.english: Human, looks like she has something to say? Hey! Speak up.
1000600597.korean: 인간, 얘가 할 말이 있는가본데?&n야! 빨리 말해봐.

1000600598.english: Other AGS units on the currently isolated island are in danger of being destroyed by illegal terrorist activities. Requesting rescue.
1000600598.korean: 현재 고립된 섬에 다른 AGS들이 불법적인 테러 활동으로 파괴될 위기.&n구조를 요청.

1000600599.english: An island? Is there something like that around here?
1000600599.korean: 섬? 이 근처에 그런 게 있어?

1000600600.english: Preparing GPS information report… Requesting verification of geographic information on the command console if necessary.
1000600600.korean: GPS 정보 보고 준비 중…&n필요할 경우, 지휘 콘솔에 있는 지리 정보를 확인 요청함.

1000600601.english: Start of geographic information report for rescue operation.
1000600601.korean: 구출 작전을 위한 지리 정보 보고 시작.

1000600602.english: An AGS base currently exists at the designated location, and multiple rescue and delivery requests have been detected up to 2 days ago.
1000600602.korean: 현재 지정된 위치에 AGS 거점이 존재하며 &n2일 전까지 다수의 구조 및 인도 요청이 감지되었음.

1000600603.english: The place you're pointing to is... an island? How did the Metal Parasites get onto the island? They're probably afraid of the sea...
1000600603.korean: 지금 가리킨 곳은… 섬인데?&n어떻게 섬에 철충들이 들어간 거죠? 철충들은 바다를 무서워 할 텐데...

1000600604.english: The island has a bridge connecting it to the ground. It is believed that terrorists, whose identities are currently unknown, have infiltrated the area.
1000600604.korean: 해당 섬은 지상을 잇는 교량이 존재함.&n현재, 정체가 특정되지 않는 테러리스트들은 그 곳으로 침입한 것으로 추정됨.

1000600605.english: Master, what should we do? Even though there are Metal Parasites here, if you want to contact AGS, I think it would be a good idea to respond to the rescue request.
1000600605.korean: 주인님, 어쩌시겠어요? 철충들이 있는 곳이긴 하지만 &nAGS와 접촉을 원하시면 구조 요청에 응하시는 것도 좋을 것 같아요.

1000600606.english: Yes. Then I will prepare for battle. &n Please also prepare to command, Master.
1000600606.korean: 네. 그럼 전투를 준비할게요. &n주인님께서도 지휘를 준비해 주세요.

1000600608.english: What the heck? There's no one here. Hey! Dog, is the signal clear here?
1000600608.korean: 뭐야? 이건, 아무도 없잖아.&n야! 개, 신호 여기 확실해?

1000600609.english: Multiple machine infection reactions were detected. It is believed that the AGS present here were captured and became hosts to a parasitic terrorist known as the Metal Parasite.
1000600609.korean: 기계 감염 반응 다수 측정됨. 이곳에 있던 AGS는 철충이라 지칭되는 &n기생충형 테러리스트에게 포획되어 숙주가 된 것으로 추정됨.

1000600610.english: What? So all the AGS here? &n I said there were a lot of them earlier!
1000600610.korean: 뭐? 그럼 여기 있던 AGS들이 전부?&n아까 숫자도 많다고 그랬잖아!

1000600611.english: Master, it seems like all the military AGS have been infected by the Metal Parasite and taken away. What should we do?
1000600611.korean: 주인님, 아무래도 군용 AGS들이 모두 철충에게 감염돼 뺏긴 것 같아요.&n어떻게 할까요?

1000600613.english: The Metal Parasite are coming... &n It's a bit far...

1000600614.english: Master, I think we should leave for now. Everyone, hurry up. We have to get out of here first.
1000600614.korean: 주인님, 일단 자리를 피해야 할 것 같아요.&n모두 서둘러. 일단 빠져 나가야 해.

1000600615.english: We've gotten out, but what should we do? &n Constantia, ask the humans. Tell them how we should get back.
1000600615.korean: 일단 빠져 나오긴 했는데 어떡하면 좋지? &n콘스탄챠, 인간한테 한 번 물어봐. 우리가 어떻게 돌아가는 게 좋을 지 말야.

1000600616.english: Hoo, Sir Griffon seems to like her lord quite a bit. &n Well, your command has been excellent up to this point.
1000600616.korean: 호오, 그리폰 경은 주군이 꽤나 마음에 들었나 보구나.&n하긴, 여기까지 주군의 지휘는 굉장히 훌륭했지.

1000600617.english: Who do you like? Not at all?

1000600618.english: …Well, he's pretty good at commanding. And his judgment isn't bad either… Anyway, isn't that what it is?
1000600618.korean: … 그냥 일단 지휘는 좀 잘하니까.&n판단하는 것도 나쁘지 않고… 어쨌든 그런 것 아니거든?

1000600619.english: Haha. You're quite blushing for something like that. However, it's still too early to entertain such thoughts towards your lord. In times like these, I, the eldest, should...
1000600619.korean: 후후. 그런 것 치고는 꽤나 얼굴이 붉어졌구나. 하지만, 주군에게 그런 생각을 &n품는 것은 아직 이르다. 이럴 땐 최연장자인 내가…

1000600621.english: Haha. You must be embarrassed. You're just a bunch of girls. Hahahaha!
1000600621.korean: 하하. 부끄러운가 보구나. 그저 아녀자들이란. 하하하하!

1000600622.english: What are you talking about? You want to give it a try?
1000600622.korean: 뭐라는 거야? 한 번 해보잔 거지?

1000600623.english: …Guys, calm down for a moment. I need to ask Master about the situation first.
1000600623.korean: … 얘들아 잠깐만 진정할래. 주인님께 일단 상황을 여쭤봐야 하니까.

1000600625.english: First of all, there are too many enemies on the other side of the bridge. It looks difficult to cross the bridge again.
1000600625.korean: 일단, 다리 건너편엔 적들이 너무 많아요.&n다시 다리를 건너긴 힘들어 보여요.

1000600626.english: There are almost no enemies inside the island. &n But I don't think it'll work if you go there because you'll be isolated...
1000600626.korean: 섬 안쪽엔 적들이 거의 없어요. &n그래도 그쪽으로 가면 고립이 되니까 안될 것 같은데…

1000600627.english: Lure them... &n Is your master trying to lure the enemies outside the bridge towards the island?
1000600627.korean: 유인한다라… &n주인님께선 혹시 다리 바깥쪽에 있는 적들을 섬쪽으로 끌어들이자는 건가요?

1000600628.english: Ah, right. Since the island's coastal road is a single road anyway, I think it would work if I circled the island and lured them...
1000600628.korean: 아, 그래. 어차피 섬의 해안길은 외길이니까 섬을 한 바퀴 돌면서 유인하면 &n될 것 같긴 한데…

1000600629.english: It's not like there aren't any enemies ahead. What if they catch up?
1000600629.korean: 앞에도 적이 없는 건 아니란 말야. 혹시 따라잡히면 어떡해?

1000600630.english: I have to break through quickly before they catch up. There's no other way.
1000600630.korean: 따라잡히기 전, 빠르게 돌파해야겠지. 다른 방법도 없으니까.

1000600631.english: Cheek... This will be hard... Okay. Let's give it a try.
1000600631.korean: 치이… 힘들긴 하겠네… 알았어.&n한 번 해보자고.

1000600632.english: Tch! I'm almost caught up. What should I do?

1000600633.english: … The bridge ends ahead of me. If I just go there, it'll be a short walk to the hangar. &n If I just get there…
1000600633.korean: … 저 앞에 다리가 끝나. 거기만 가면 격납고까진 금방이야.&n거기까지만 가면…

1000600634.english: Ugh! No! There's a bug on the other side of the bridge too... &n Humans, what should we do?
1000600634.korean: 윽! 안돼! 다리 건너편에도 철충이…&n인간, 우리 어떻게 해야해?

1000600635.english: Huh? What does that mean? They're chasing me from behind too. &n I can fly across, but the others...
1000600635.korean: 응? 그게 무슨 소리야? 뒤에서도 쫓아온다고. &n나야 날아서 건널 수 있지만 다른 사람들은…

1000600636.english: Ah! No way... Master? The communication distance is getting closer! Griffon, quickly blow up the bridge. Everyone can jump down.
1000600636.korean: 아! 설마… 주인님? 통신 거리가 가까워지고 있군요!&n그리폰, 빨리 다리를 폭파해. 모두 뛰어내리면 되니까.

1000600637.english: What? What are you talking about? &n Constantia, why are you like this too?
1000600637.korean: 뭐야? 무슨 소리야?&n콘스탄챠, 너까지 왜 이래?

1000600638.english: We can all swim. Let's go swimming.
1000600638.korean: 우린 모두 헤엄을 칠 수 있잖아. 수영으로 가면 돼.

1000600639.english: What are you talking about! How far is it? &n How can you go there by swimming!
1000600639.korean: 뭔 소리야! 거기까지 거리가 얼만데? &n어떻게 수영으로 간다고!

1000600640.english: Whoa? Human? How? Huh? You brought the submarine!?
1000600640.korean: 어어? 인간? 어떻게? 어?&n잠수함을 끌고 온 거야?

1000600641.english: Okay, everyone jump into the water. The Metal Parasites won't be able to chase you all the way to the bottom of the sea.
1000600641.korean: 자, 모두 물로 뛰어들어. 철충들은 바다 속까지 쫓아오진 못할 거야.

1000600643.english: WARNING! WARNING! &n Swimming by civilians without proper water safety equipment is prohibited…
1000600643.korean: 경고! 경고! &n적절한 수중 안전 장비를 착용하지 않은 민간인의 수영은 금지되어 있습…

1000600644.english: Griffon, take Pupp Head and fly up, then head toward the submarine!
1000600644.korean: 그리폰, 펍 헤드를 데리고 날아올라서 잠수함 쪽으로 움직여.

1000600645.english: Also, the water depth here is over 50 meters…

1000600646.english: Dog, shut up! Let’s hurry up!

1000600648.english: That was really close earlier. Johanna, if you can’t swim, you should have said so! I almost died carrying you too.
1000600648.korean: 아깐 정말 큰일 날 뻔 했어. 요안나, &n수영을 못하면 못한다고 말을 하던가! 너까지 들고 나느라 죽을 뻔 했다고.

1000600649.english: Haha! This is embarrassing. As you know, my armor is quite heavy, so staying afloat in the water is a bit difficult.
1000600649.korean: 하하! 이거 부끄럽군. 아시다시피 짐의 무구는 제법 무거워서 말이야.&n물에 뜨는 건 좀 힘들지.

1000600651.english: Out of the question. I may be a queen, but I am also a true knight. A knight never abandons her armor. Especially since my sword is like my bride!
1000600651.korean: 아니될 말. 난 여왕이지만, 진정한 기사이기도 하지. &n기사는 무구를 버리지 않는다네. 특히 검은 내 신부나 다름없지.

1000600653.english: The moment I dedicated my life to God, I vowed to live a lifetime of purity. Groom...? No way… Well… if its the lord... Actually, nevermind.
1000600653.korean: 내 삶을 신께 바친 순간 평생 순결한 삶을 맹세했다네. 신랑이라니… &n어림도 없지. 물론… 아, 아닐세.

1000600654.english: What are you talking about? That’s totally silly! You can be a bride but not a groom? Also, that’s surprising, LRL. I didn’t know you could swim…
1000600654.korean: 뭐래? 완전 바보잖아. 신부는 되고 신랑은 안되냐?&n그것보다 의외네? LRL? 너한테 헤엄을 치는 재주가 있었다니…

1000600655.english: Do not call me by that lowly name! And Hoo. Hoo. Hoo. Comparing the talents I possess to those of ordinary humans… how foolish.
1000600655.korean: 그 천한 이름으로 나를 부르지 말거라. 그리고 &n후. 후. 후. 내가 가진 재주를 평범한 인간들과 비교를 하다니… 어리석구나.

1000600656.english: ... There’s only one human here, you know?
1000600656.korean: … 여기 인간 한 명 밖에 없거든?

1000600657.english: Human, you’re smarter than I thought? Luring them and cutting off the bridge to isolate those guys on the island...
1000600657.korean: 인간, 생각보다 머리 좋던데? &n유인을 하고 다리를 끊어서 그 녀석들을 섬에 고립시켜 버리다니…

1000600658.english: Was that what you were thinking when you first sent us to the island?
1000600658.korean: 처음에 우릴 섬으로 보낼 때부터 생각하고 있었던 거야?

1000600659.english: W-what are you talking about… like I’d fall for you!?
1000600659.korean: 무, 무슨 소리를… 반할 것 같냐?

1000600660.english: What’s this? Why’s your face turning red? Are you eyeing my vassal again…
1000600660.korean: 뭐야? 왜 얼굴이 빨개지는 건데? 또 내 권속을 탐내는…

1000600662.english: I was just a little bit nervous…

1000600663.english: Don’t get all nervous over something like that! Anyway, answer me that from earlier. Were you thinking about that from the start?
1000600663.korean: 너도 그런 걸로 두근거리지 말고!&n그보다, 그보다 아까 그거나 대답해 봐. 처음부터 그걸 생각하고 있었던 거야?

1000600664.english: Hoo. Hoo. my vassal is truly the cunning one. Well done.
1000600664.korean: 후. 후. 역시 내 권속다운 지략. 훌륭하였도다.

1000600665.english: Heh heh… I see. You were thinking about that from the beginning. &n … You raccoon…
1000600665.korean: 흐흥… 그렇구나. 처음부터 생각을 하고 있었던 거구나.&n… 지네…

1000600666.english: Oh, no. But what about Constantia? Where did she go?
1000600666.korean: 아, 아냐. 그런데 콘스탄챠는? 걔는 어디갔어?

1000600667.english: Constantia went to the communications room?

1000600668.english: Huh? The communications room? Why did you go to the communications room? Oh! Did you connect with Labiata by any chance? Human, let's go together.
1000600668.korean: 응? 통신실? 통신실엔 왜 갔지? 아! 혹시 라비아타랑 통신이 연결 된 건가?&n인간, 같이 가보자.

1000600669.english: Yes, yes, sister. We're currently underwater. &n There may be occasional communication interruptions.
1000600669.korean: 네, 네. 언니. 일단은 잠항 중이에요. &n가끔씩은 통신이 끊기기도 할 거예요.

1000600670.english: Yeah. Most of them are safe here too. There are a few injured children, but… &n It's more serious that we can't provide support here.
1000600670.korean: 그래. 이쪽도 거의 대부분 무사해. 좀 다친 아이들은 있지만…&n그것보다 이쪽에서 지원을 가 줄 수가 없어서 큰 일이구나.

1000600671.english: Why are there so many Metal Parasites?

1000600672.english: We're fine. At least as long as we're in the ocean, the Metal Parasites won't be able to attack us.
1000600672.korean: 우린 괜찮아요. 적어도 바다 속에 있는 한은 철충도 공격할 수 없을 테니까요.

1000600673.english: But... I can't stay in the submarine forever to get supplies. And something strange happened...
1000600673.korean: 그렇긴 하지만… 물자를 구하기 위해선 그래도 계속 잠수함 안에만 있을 수는 없잖니.&n게다가 이상한 일도 벌어졌고…

1000600675.english: Yeah. I've been avoiding that monster for a while... but I haven't seen it for a while now. &n Its direct subordinates, the [c][ffd130]symbiotes[-][/c], are still here... but strangely, only the monster has disappeared.
1000600675.korean: 그래. 한 동안 그 괴물을 피해 다녔는데… 얼마 전부터 그 괴물이 보이질 않아.&n그 괴물의 직속 부하들, [c][ffd130]공생체[-][/c]들은 여전히 여기에 남아 있는데… 이상하게 그 괴물만 사라졌어.

1000600676.english: By any chance... is this the [c][ffd130]stalker[-][/c] story? ... He's here now. &n We ran into each other a while ago.
1000600676.korean: 혹시… [c][ffd130]스토커[-][/c] 이야기인가요? … 지금 이쪽에 와 있어요.&n얼마 전에도 마주쳤었거든요.

1000600677.english: Surely… you didn’t go there targeting the new commander, did you?
1000600677.korean: 설마… 새로운 사령관님을 노리고 간 건 아니겠지?

1000600678.english: That would be a big problem. If they’ve figured out something about the Commander…
1000600678.korean: 그렇다면 큰일이야.&n만약에라도 사령관님에 대해서 눈치를 챈 거라면…

1000600679.english: That probably isn't the case. For now, it looked like they were attacking the AGS on this side...
1000600679.korean: 그렇진 않을 거예요. 일단은 이쪽에 있는 AGS를 공격하는 것 같아 보였으니…

1000600680.english: Still, be extra careful... For now, the monster's [c][ffd130]symbiotes[-][/c] are here, but... the monster itself is dangerous enough.
1000600680.korean: 그래도 각별히 조심하렴… 일단은 괴물의 [c][ffd130]공생체[-][/c]들은 여기에 있지만…&n그 괴물 자체 만으로도 충분히 위험하니까.

1000600681.english: Stalker? Labiata! Did you say stalker? And the stalker is separated from the [c][ffd130]symbiotes[-][/c]?
1000600681.korean: 스토커? 라비아타! 스토커라고 했어?&n스토커가 [c][ffd130]공생체[-][/c]들이랑 떨어져 있다고?

1000600683.english: This is my chance! I'll kill that monster! This time for sure…

1000600684.english: Wait, Griffon, we need to think carefully about this. Stalker isn't just an ordinary monster. We can't catch him so easily just because his subordinates are gone. We need to make a careful plan…
1000600684.korean: 잠깐 그리폰, 이건 신중하게 생각해야 해. 스토커는 보통 괴물이 아니잖아. &n부하들이 없어졌다고 그렇게 쉽게 잡을 수 없어. 신중하게 계획을 세워서…

1000600685.english: Shut up. Would you have said that even if Labiata had been killed by a stalker? No, you wouldn't. If you miss this opportunity, you will really regret it.
1000600685.korean: 시끄러워. 라비아타가 스토커에게 죽었어도 그렇게 이야기했을 거야?&n아니잖아. 이 기회를 놓치면 정말 후회하게 될 거야.

1000600686.english: You can't stop me this time.

1000600688.english: Master, the griffon... is trying to... go outside... and the submarine is surfacing!
1000600688.korean: 주인님, 그리폰이… 바깥으로… 가려고...&n잠수함이 부상하고 있어요!

1000600689.english: I’ll tell you about that… when I get back. It’s really dangerous for Griffon to go out alone…
1000600689.korean: 그건… 다녀와서 말씀 드릴게요. 그리폰 혼자서 나가면 정말 위험해서…

1000600690.english: Please give the order so that we can follow immediately. We ask for your help.
1000600690.korean: 저희가 바로 따라나갈 수 있도록 명령을 내려 주세요.&n부탁 드립니다.

1000600691.english: Damn it... They're not stalkers. Well, still, the fact that this many came means... there must be stalkers nearby, too...
1000600691.korean: 젠장… 스토커가 아니잖아.&n뭐, 그래도 이 정도 숫자가 왔다는 건… 스토커도 근처에 있다는 건데…

1000600692.english: That was dangerous. How could you go out alone like that? If you had actually met a stalker…
1000600692.korean: 위험했어. 혼자 그렇게 나가면 어떡하니?&n정말로 스토커를 만나기라도 했으면…

1000600693.english: Don't state the obvious. Then I'm just going to finish that bastard off.
1000600693.korean: 당연한 소리 하지마. 그럼 그 자식을 끝장내는 거지.

1000600694.english: Griffon… I know how you feel, but…

1000600695.english: Anyway, don't even think about stopping me. Hey, you human, you're listening, right? Even if you try to stop me, I'm going to go get rid of the stalker.
1000600695.korean: 어쨌든 말릴 생각은 하지마.&n거기, 인간도 듣고 있지? 말려도 스토커를 없애러 갈 거니까.

1000600696.english: Don't bother trying to hold them back with orders. If you make them return by order... they might have no choice but to listen, but there will absolutely be no proper fight next time.
1000600696.korean: 괜히 명령으로 붙잡을 생각 하지마. 명령으로 돌아오게 하면… &n어쩔 수 듣긴 하겠지만 담부터 제대로 싸울 일은 절대 없을 테니까.

1000600699.english: Master, what do you mean... Stalkers are truly dangerous monsters. Besides... they always travel with a royal guard, so for us Su-ro...
1000600699.korean: 주인님, 그게 무슨… 스토커는 정말로 위험한 괴물이에요.&n게다가… 항상 친위대를 거느리고 다녀서 우리 수로는…

1000600701.english: What do you mean? Don't... you're not just trying to stall for time, are you? You really are planning a scheme, aren't you?
1000600701.korean: 그게 무슨 소리야?&n설마… 적당히 꾀서 시간 끌려는 거 아니지? 정말 작전 세우려고 하는 거지?

1000600703.english: You really... how can your expression change so quickly?
1000600703.korean: 너도 참… 어떻게 표정이 그렇게 빨리 변하니?

1000600704.english: What, what? Nothing much has changed. Hmph... Humans are actually a bit reasonable, aren't they? Alright. I'm heading back, so make sure you have your plans set up properly.
1000600704.korean: 뭐, 뭐가? 별로 변한 것 없거든? 흥… 인간 의외로 말이 좀 통하네? &n알았어. 돌아갈 테니 계획 잘 세워 놓고 있으라고.

1000600705.english: What are you doing, Constantia? Let's hurry back! We need to get ready to fight now.
1000600705.korean: 뭐해? 콘스탄챠? 빨리 돌아가자!&n이제 싸울 준비를 해야지.

1000600706.english: Indeed… that’s a good plan. Surely, if that stalker knows his unit has been annihilated, he’ll want to verify it too.
1000600706.korean: 과연… 좋은 작전이다. &n확실히 자기 부대가 괴멸된 걸 알면 스토커 녀석도 확인을 하고 싶겠지.

1000600707.english: Besides, if you have your back to the cliff, it will be easy to retreat into the sea. And since you are attacking the enemy on a mountain path, it won't be difficult to set up an ambush.
1000600707.korean: 게다가 절벽을 등지고 있으면 바다 속으로 퇴각을 하기도 쉬울 테고요.&n산길에서 적을 치는 거니 매복하기도 어렵지 않겠군요.

1000600708.english: The problem is that he's a coward, so he might send his subordinates ahead first...
1000600708.korean: 문제는 그 녀석이 겁쟁이라 부하들부터 먼저 보낼 수 있단 건데…

1000600709.english: We can just reduce the numbers then. The stalker won't be able to hide forever. Besides, that is why we sent the griffon in advance to verify that.
1000600709.korean: 그땐 숫자를 줄이면 되요. 언제까지 스토커가 숨어있진 못할 거예요.&n그리고 그걸 확인하기 위해서 그리폰을 미리 보내 놓은 거니까요.

1000600710.english: Then, do I just need to wait for Lord Griffon's communication?
1000600710.korean: 그럼 그리폰 경의 통신을 기다리면 되는 것인가?

1000600711.english: Warning! Warning! Upstanding citizens and Bio-roids, while I commend your bravery, the danger posed by this criminal known as the Iron Bug is…
1000600711.korean: 경고! 경고! 건전한 시민 및 바이오로이드 여러분, &n용감한 행동은 칭찬 드리오나 이 철충이라 불리는 범죄자의 위험성은…

1000600712.english: Ah, a communication! A green signal… It’s a stalker.

1000600713.english: You fell for it too easily. Did you not suspect it was a trap for the first time?
1000600713.korean: 너무 쉽게 걸려들었군. 함정이란 걸 조금도 의심하지 않은 건가?

1000600714.english: Or, I suppose it doesn't matter if it's a trap. Because the stalker is likely underestimating us.
1000600714.korean: 아니면, 함정이라도 상관 없다는 거겠죠.&n스토커는 우릴 얕보고 있을 테니까요.

1000600715.english: Master, preparations are complete. It is time to go out. Please take command.
1000600715.korean: 주인님, 준비는 끝났어요. 출전할 시간입니다.&n지휘를 부탁 드려요.

1000600717.english: Ah... yeah. I had a strange feeling for some reason...

1000600719.english: Let's go back now. Since the connection in this area is gone... there will be more things we can do.
1000600719.korean: 이제 돌아가자. 이 지역의 연결체가 없어졌으니…&n할 수 있는 일이 더 많아질 거야.

1000600720.english: Because we'll have to prepare for the next fight.

1000600721.english: - Now that the bridge of the Orca is now safe from the Stalker’s attack. I find myself reflecting on everything that happened.
1000600721.korean: - 스토커의 습격에서 안전해진 오르카의 함교, 나는 그 동안 겪었던 일에 대해 되뇌이고 있다.

1000600722.english: - My memory feels completely empty. But with the help of these kind Bioroids, I can manage my basic daily life—just barely.
1000600722.korean: - 내 기억은 마치 텅 비어있다. 친절한 바이오로이드들의 도움을 받아 일상 생활이나&n가능한 정도.

1000600723.english: - The only thing that remains clearly in my mind is the knowledge about the Metal Parasites.
1000600723.korean: - 그런 내 기억 속에서 유독 남은 것은 철충에 관한 지식뿐이다.

1000600724.english: - Their weaknesses, their behavioral patterns, ways to eliminate them.
1000600724.korean: - 그 괴물에 대한 약점, 그 괴물이 행동하는 패턴, 그 괴물을 없앨 방법들.

1000600725.english: - But whenever I try to recall where I got that knowledge, a headache and an overwhelming urge to sleep hits me—as if my brain is rejecting the act of remembering.
1000600725.korean: - 그렇다고 내가 그 지식을 얻은 경로를 떠올리려 하면 두통과 격렬한 수면욕이&n올라온다. 마치 내 뇌가 그 기억을 떠올리는 것을 거절하는 것처럼.

1000600726.english: - What’s wrong with me? Why did I lose my memories?
1000600726.korean: - 내게 무슨 문제가 있는 걸까? 왜 나는 기억을 잃은 걸까?

1000600727.english: - I don’t know. In the end, the only thing I can do is gather new information about the situation I’ve fallen into, to replace the memories I’ve lost.
1000600727.korean: - 알 수 없다. 결국 내가 할 수 있는 건, 사라져 버린 내 기억 대신 내가 떨어진 이 상황에&n대한 정보를 새로 모으는 것뿐이다.

1000600728.english: - There’s nothing else I can do.
1000600728.korean: - 그것 외엔 내가 취할 수 있는 방법은 없다.

1000600729.english: I came because I was summoned, Master. Is something the matter?
1000600729.korean: 호출을 받고 왔어요. 주인님, 무슨 일이라도 있으신가요?

1000600730.english: Right. It’s not like we’re always free. What’s going on?
1000600730.korean: 그래. 우리도 늘 한가하진 않다고.&n무슨 일이야?

1000600731.english: Right, I did say I’d explain once our dire situation was dealt with. Where should I start...?
1000600731.korean: 그러고보니 급한 일이 끝나면 말씀을 드리기로 했었으니까요.&n어디서부터 말씀을 드리는 게 좋을까요?

1000600732.english: First, I think I need to ask how much you remember, Master. Hmm... do you know how we were created, and about the war?
1000600732.korean: 일단, 주인님의 기억이 얼마나 남아 있는지 먼저 여쭤봐야 할 것 같아요.&n음… 저희가 어떻게 만들어졌는지와 전쟁에 대해서는 알고 계신가요?

1000600733.english: You don’t know at all? Ugh... Then I’ll have to explain everything from the very beginning. It’s going to be long, you know?
1000600733.korean: 아예 몰라? 으휴…&n그럼 완전히 처음부터 설명을 해야 하잖아. 엄청 길 텐데?

1000600734.english: Alright then, I’ll start from the beginning. After we —BioRoids— appeared in the world, a lot of things changed.
1000600734.korean: 그럼, 처음부터 설명을 드릴게요.&n저희, 그러니까 바이오로이드가 세상에 등장하고 나서 많은 변화가 있었어요.

1000600735.english: To some humans, our existence was a huge help... But some others hated us.
1000600735.korean: 어떤 인간님들께는 저희의 존재가 큰 도움이 되었지만…&n어떤 인간님들은 저희를 싫어했죠.

1000600736.english: They believed we were stealing human jobs and causing poverty.
1000600736.korean: 그 분들은 저희가 인간의 일을 빼앗고 가난하게 만들었다고 생각했거든요.

1000600737.english: Even though we were created to help humanity... Anyway, that conflict eventually led to a war among humans.
1000600737.korean: 저흰 인간님들을 돕기 위해 태어난 건데…&n어쨌든 그런 갈등 때문에 인간님들 사이에 전쟁이 터졌어요.

1000600738.english: It was a war between countries that supported the companies producing us, and those that opposed us who had public backing from anti-Bioroid factions.
1000600738.korean: 저희를 생산하는 회사와 &n저희를 싫어하는 인간님들의 지지를 의식한 국가 간의 전쟁이었어요.

1000600739.english: To wipe out the companies, those countries built armies of robots —AGS units— And in response, the companies armed Bioroids like us to fight back.
1000600739.korean: 국가는 회사를 말살하기 위해서 로봇 군단, 그러니까 AGS를 만들었고&n회사도 저희 같은 안드로이드를 무장시켜서 싸웠어요.

1000600740.english: We couldn’t attack humans, of course, but the main forces in the war were the AGS units on the government side, and us Bioroids. And when we were ordered to fight, we did mostly suppression tactics.
1000600740.korean: 인간을 공격할 수는 없지만  이미 전쟁의 주력은 정부측의 AGS와 저희 &n바이오로이드였으니까요. 그리고 명령이 있다면 제압만 하는 식이었거든요.

1000600741.english: In the end, the war ended in the companies victory. But... The chaos, crime, and civil conflict that the war left behind continued.
1000600741.korean: 결국, 전쟁은 회사의 승리로 끝났어요. 하지만...&n전쟁이 낳은 혼란과 범죄, 내전은 계속 됐어요.

1000600742.english: I read about that time once. The humans acted in barbaric ways. When I saw that, I thought humans must have looked like monsters back then.
1000600742.korean: 나도 그때 이야기 읽은 적 있어. 인간들 엄청 야만적이게 굴었다고.&n난 그거 보고,그땐 인간은 엄청 추하게 생겼을 거라고 생각했거든?

1000600743.english: Griffon, sounds like your opinion has changed a bit now?

1000600744.english: Wh-What... I still totally think that, okay? So stop with that nonsense and just keep talking.
1000600744.korean: 무, 무슨… 지금도 완전히 그렇게 생각하거든?&n그런 거 아니니까 할 이야기나 계속 하라고.

1000600745.english: You don’t have to be embarrassed about stuff like that. Hehe. Well, I won’t say anything more for now.
1000600745.korean: 그런 건 부끄러워하지 않아도 괜찮아. &n후후. 뭐, 지금은 아무 말 않을게.

1000600746.english: Then I’ll continue the story. Amid all that chaos, the Metal Parasites invaded all of the sudden from within the skies.
1000600746.korean: 그럼 이야기를 계속할게요.&n그 혼란 중에 그때 철충이 쳐들어 왔어요. 갑자기, 하늘을 뒤덮으면서요.

1000600747.english: The humans, already in disarray, couldn’t fight back properly… And once the Metal Parasites took over the communication networks, we couldn’t receive proper orders either.
1000600747.korean: 혼란에 빠져있던 인간님들은 제대로 반격을 하지 못했고…&n철충들이 통신망을 잡아 먹으면서 저희도 제대로 된 명령을 받지 못했죠.

1000600748.english: The war quickly turned one-sided, and in the end, the humans were completely wiped out. The Metal Parasites hunted them down with obsessive persistence.
1000600748.korean: 그렇게, 전쟁은 일방적으로 밀리다 인간님들은 모두 멸망해 버리고 말았어요.&n철충들은 집요할 정도로 인간 사냥을 했거든요.

1000600749.english: Strangely… they didn’t seem all that interested in us. They only targeted humans who were in safe locations.
1000600749.korean: 이상하게도… 우리에겐 큰 관심이 없다는 듯이.&n안전한 곳에 계시던 인간님들만 공격하시더군요.

1000600750.english: Eventually, once all the humans went extinct, we had no choice but to keep retreating — because there was no one left to command us.
1000600750.korean: 결국, 인간님들이 모두 사라지고 난 뒤에 &n저흰 계속 퇴각만 할 수 밖에 없었죠. 명령자가 없었으니까요.

1000600751.english: It was really hard back then. Especially... that bastard Stalker... well, it’s dead now, but still...
1000600751.korean: 그땐 진짜 힘들었어. &n특히… 스토커 그 자식은… 뭐… 이제 끝나긴 했지만…

1000600752.english: Anyway, now that we’ve met you, Master… Our luck is finally turning around.
1000600752.korean: 어쨌든, 이제 우린 주인님을 만났으니까…&n다행인 거죠.

1000600753.english: You seem worried. Don’t be. At the very least, humanity’s fate isn’t over yet.
1000600753.korean: 걱정이 되시나 보군요. 안심하세요.&n적어도 인간님들의 운명이 끝난 건 아니니까.

1000600754.english: Uh... well... I mean, I was created using genetic information from a human female, so...
1000600754.korean: 그… 그게…&n전 그러니까… 어쨌든 인간님 여성의 유전 정보로 만들어 졌고…

1000600755.english: I also have all the necessary biological organs, you know.
1000600755.korean: 그… 필요한 생체 기관도 다 있으니까요.

1000600756.english: Constantia, what are you saying?! That’s so embarrassing!

1000600757.english: It’s still way too early for that kind of talk! I mean... Anyway, let’s change the subject. That thing from earlier — about making new allies.
1000600757.korean: 아직, 그건 좀 이르잖아. 그…&n어쨌든 … 그러니까 딴 이야기부터 하자고. 아까 그거… 동료를 만드는 거.

1000600758.english: True, we have more urgent matters right now. Master, there’s something I’d like to tell you. It’s about how to increase our forces.
1000600758.korean: 하긴, 지금 당장 급한 일이 있으니까. 주인님, 주인님께 드릴 말씀이 있어요.&n동료를 늘리는 방법에 대해서예요.

1000600759.english: Yesterday, I was scouting around the abandoned factories nearby, and I found something amazing. You probably know what it is — a Bioroid synthesizer. There’s even one in this submarine.
1000600759.korean: 내가 어제 근처 폐공장들 쪽에서 정찰을 하다가 엄청 좋은 걸 봤거든?&n너도 알 거야. 바이오로이드 조제기 말야. 여기 잠수함에도 하나 있으니까.

1000600760.english: But I saw a better one among the discarded units at that old factory. It might’ve been a full Bioroid production plant. There’s probably a lot of genetic seeds there too!
1000600760.korean: 지금 폐공장 쪽에서 버려진 조제기 중에 더 좋은 걸 봤거든. &n게다가 거기 아마 바이오로이드 공장이었을 거야. 유전자 씨앗도 많을 거고.

1000600761.english: Yep. Genetic seeds. You need to insert one in order for the machine to read the genetic data and create a Bioroid.
1000600761.korean: 응. 유전자 씨앗. &n그걸 넣어야지 그 유전정보를 읽어서 바이오로이드를 만들 수 있거든.

1000600762.english: So while we’re there, let’s secure that synthesizer and also grab some of those seeds while we’re at it.
1000600762.korean: 가는 김에 그 조제기도 얻고, 겸사겸사 유전자 씨앗도 좀 가지고 오자고.

1000600763.english: That’s how we’ve always created new allies up to now. But we’ve lost that equipment, and we’ve run out of seeds too.
1000600763.korean: 저희도 이제껏 동료 생산은 그렇게 해왔어요.&n이젠 그 설비도 잃고 씨앗도 다 떨어졌지만.

1000600764.english: There may still be some Metal Parasites lingering nearby, But without the Stalker, they shouldn’t pose too much of a threat.
1000600764.korean: 아마 근처에 남은 철충들이 있긴 하지만, &n스토커가 없어진 이상 그렇게 위협적이진 않을 거예요.

1000600765.english: What do you think? Shall we prepare to deploy?

1000600766.english: What the—! Why would you ask something like that?! Don’t you know how embarrassing that is?!
1000600766.korean: 무슨! 그런 걸 왜 물어?&n넌 창피한 것도 몰라?

1000600767.english: ...More importantly, listen to the story properly...That question from earlier... I’ll answer it once we’ve gotten to know each other better.
1000600767.korean: … 그것보다 이야기나 제대로 들으라고.&n… 방금 물은 건… 나중에 좀 더 친해지고 나서 이야기 해줄 테니까.

1000600768.english: Is that so? So you haven’t completely lost your memories, then. In any case, that war left humanity in total chaos.
1000600768.korean: 그런가요? 기억을 완전히 잃으신 건 아닌가 보네요.&n어쨌든 그 전쟁 때문에 인간님들은 결국 혼란에 빠질 수 밖에 없었죠.

1000600769.english: This must be the place. There's a door sealed with an electronic lock.
1000600769.korean: 여기로군. 전자 장치로 봉인된 문이 있다.

1000600770.english: Can’t you just say it’s locked? Why make it sound so complicated?
1000600770.korean: 그냥 잠긴 문이라고 하면 안돼?&n뭘 그렇게 어렵게 말을 하는 거야?

1000600771.english: First, Griffon, scan to check if there are any Metal Parasites inside. Johanna, just in case, keep an eye on our surroundings.
1000600771.korean: 일단, 그리폰 안쪽에 철충이 있는지 탐지해줘.&n요안나, 혹시 모르니 주위 경계를 부탁해요.

1000600772.english: Alright. but keep a close watch, it will be dangerous as I'm scouting. Here we go!
1000600772.korean: 알았어. 그럼 탐지하는 동안은 위험하니까 잘 지켜 달라고.&n그럼 시작할게.

1000600773.english: Don’t worry. My loyal shield will protect you.
1000600773.korean: 걱정 말게. 짐의 충실한 방패가 그대를 지킬 터이니.

1000600774.english: … No internal life or electrical reactions. … Internal power active… Cryogenic state… Detecting… 25% … 30%
1000600774.korean: … 내부 생명 및 전기 반응 없음. … 내부 동력 가동 중… 극저온 상태…&n탐지 중… 25% … 30%

1000600775.english: The detection is progressing faster than I expected. You must be tired from the fight too, Griffon.
1000600775.korean: 생각보다 탐지의 진행이 빠르네요.&n그리폰도 전투로 지쳤을 텐데.

1000600776.english: Haha! Of course… Don’t you enjoy meeting people, Lady Griffon? You’ll soon have a companion to be with—how could you not be in a hurry?
1000600776.korean: 하하! 그럴 수 밖에… 그리폰 경은 사람 만나는 걸 좋아하지 않는가?&n곧 함께 할 동료가 생길 테니 어찌 서두르지 않겠는가?

1000600777.english: That’s not it, okay? It’s just that today… tsk… you’re making me lose focus. Keep quiet. Searching for parasitic organism reactions… None detected. … 95% … 100%
1000600777.korean: 그런 거 아니거든? 그냥 오늘은… 씨잉… 집중력 떨어지잖아. 조용해 달라고.&n기생체 반응 탐색 중… 해당 사항 없음. … 95% … 100%

1000600778.english: It’s done! There’s no one inside. The liquid nitrogen storage inside is intact too… I think this really is the genetic seed vault.
1000600778.korean: 끝났다! 안엔 아무도 없어. 내부에 액체 질소 보관고도 멀쩡하고…&n유전자 씨앗 창고가 맞는 거 같아.

1000600779.english: That’s a relief. I was already worried since we’re short on comrades… Now, we need to think of a way to open it. Blowing it up is out of the question… how do we open it?
1000600779.korean: 다행이네. 그러지 않아도 동료가 부족해 걱정이 많았는데…&n이제, 열 방법을 생각해 봐야 해. 폭발은 곤란하고… 어떻게 연다?

1000600780.english: When it’s hard to break a seal because you’re afraid of damaging what’s inside, the best way is to cut it open!
1000600780.korean: 안이 부서질 까봐 봉인을 파괴하기 난감할 때,&n제일 좋은 방법은 베어 버리는 것이지.

1000600781.english: Stand back, I’m going to gather my strength for a moment. I’ll cut it through in one strike.
1000600781.korean: 잠깐 힘을 모을 테니 물러서게.&n한 번에 베어낼 테니.

1000600782.english: You really think you can cut through this?

1000600783.english: Heh. For one who has properly trained their sword, it’s nothing. Wait here. I’ll open the door to the room where our future comrades’ genetic data is sealed.
1000600783.korean: 후후. 검을 제대로 단련한 자에겐 아무 것도 아니지.&n기다리게. 내가 우리 동료가 될 유전자 정보가 봉인된 방의 문을 열 테니.

1000600784.english: What, are we off to slay a demon king or something? Hehe. I just hope they’re good ones…
1000600784.korean: 무슨 마왕 잡으러 가냐?&n헤헤. 그것보다 좋은 녀석들이었으면 좋겠는데…

1000600785.english: Ah, it’s not like… I’m actually waiting for them. It’s just… it’d be convenient, you know.
1000600785.korean: 아, 딱히… 내가 얘들을 기다리는 건 아니고…&n그냥 그럼 편하단 거니까.

1000600786.english: Yeah, yeah, I know. Griffon, and don’t worry… In this world, we’ll have no choice but to get along in the end.
1000600786.korean: 그래. 그래. 알아. 그리폰, 그리고 걱정 마.&n… 이 세상에선 어쩔 수 없이 사이가 좋아질 수 밖에 없을 테니까.

1000600787.english: I’ve started the manufacturing process, so our forces will increase. Now the problem is our available resources—especially power…
1000600787.korean: 일단 제조를 시작했으니 동료들은 늘어날 거에요.&n이제 문제는 우리가 사용할 가용 자원, 특히 동력에 대한 문제인데…

1000600788.english: What about it? This area’s full of factories and markets. There should be preserved hydrogen cells, right? Can’t we get them from there?
1000600788.korean: 그게 뭐가? 이 근처가 다 공장이랑 마트잖아. 보존용 수소 전지가 있을 텐데?&n거기서 구하면 안돼?

1000600789.english: There are a lot of resources here, but… there are also a lot of Metal Parasites. And we don’t have precise terrain data either.
1000600789.korean: 이 근처에 자원이 많긴 하지만… 아무래도 철충이 많잖니.&n게다가 정확한 지형 정보도 부족하고.

1000600790.english: Heh. That’s where I can be of help!
1000600790.korean: 후후. 그 부분은 제가 도움이 되겠군요.

1000600791.english: Huh?! You—you? Amy? Human, don’t tell me she’s the one that was just manufactured?
1000600791.korean: 엇! 너, 너? 에이미? 인간, 설마 이번에 제조된 게 쟤야?

1000600792.english: Oh my! What a pleasant surprise! You seem to know me?

1000600793.english: Hmph… Do you know how much trouble you’ve caused? And you’re still wearing that shameless outfit?
1000600793.korean: 흥… 네가 얼마나 민폐를 끼쳤는데...&n여전히 파렴치한 옷차림이네?

1000600794.english: Heh… I don’t need to hear that from someone who walks around wearing only underwear instead of pants. You should be ashamed of yourself!
1000600794.korean: 후후… 바지 대신 속옷만 입고 다니는 아이에게 그런 이야길 듣고 싶진 않아요.&n부끄러운 줄을 아셔야죠.

1000600795.english: This is a combat suit! There’s nothing to be embarrassed about. Aerial units wear these suits to reduce weight, you know?
1000600795.korean: 이거 속옷 아니거든? 전투용 수트라서 전혀 부끄럽지 않은데?&n공중전 유닛은 원래 무게를 줄이려고 이런 수트 입거든?

1000600796.english: How are you exactly the same as when we first met? Come on, both of you, calm down. This isn’t the time for us to fight among ourselves!
1000600796.korean: 처음 만났을 때랑 어떻게 이렇게 똑같지? 자자, 둘 다 진정해 주세요.&n우리끼리 싸울 때가 아니잖아요.

1000600797.english: How should I put it… It just feels like there’s something about the two of them that doesn’t mesh. It was kind of like that with Amy when we were together last time too.
1000600797.korean: 뭐랄까… 어쩐지 둘이 서로 안 맞는 부분이 있는 것 같더라고요.&n저번에 함께 있었던 에이미랑도 조금 그랬거든요.

1000600798.english: Ah! So you’re the one I’m supposed to serve.
1000600798.korean: 아! 이 분이 제가 모셔야 될 분이시로군요.

1000600799.english: Military intelligence unit Amy, reporting. Really, to think someone this wonderful will be commanding me… would it be alright if I called you ‘darling’?
1000600799.korean: 군사용 첩보 유닛 에이미가 인사 드릴게요.&n정말, 이렇게 좋은 분이 절 지휘해 주신다니… 혹시 자기라도 불러도 될까요?

1000600800.english: Ugh! I knew it! Our human’s not that great a person. Total scoundrel, you know? Don’t go having weird ideas, and don’t just go around calling anyone ‘darling’!
1000600800.korean: 윽! 이럴 줄 알았어! 우리 인간 별로 좋은 사람 아냐. 완전 나쁜 놈이거든?&n괜히 쓸 데 없는 생각 하지말고, 아무한테나 자기라고 부르지 말라고!

1000600801.english: Since you’re the one who brought me into this world, shouldn’t I do something to repay the favor? Give me any order. If you want… should I tell those two to step outside for a bit?
1000600801.korean: 이런 절 태어나게 해주셨으니 은혜를 갚으려면 뭐라도 해야하지 않겠어요?&n뭐든지 시켜 주세요. 뭣 하면… 저 애들보고 잠깐 나가있으라고 할까요?

1000600802.english: It's pretty obvious, isn't it…? And as for what to do, our darling should be the one to decide, right?
1000600802.korean: 다 아시면서…&n그리고 뭘 할지는 우리 자기가 정하셔야겠죠?

1000600803.english: Our darling!? Hey! Listen to me! Why are you ignoring me? Human, you’d better not tell us to go outside!
1000600803.korean: 우리 자기? 야! 내 말을 들어! 왜 무시하는 건데?&n인간, 너 우리보고 나가라고 하기만 해봐!

1000600804.english: Phew… Miss Amy, that’s enough. Your teasing is making Griffon flustered.
1000600804.korean: 휴… 에이미 양, 거기까지만 하세요. 농담 때문에 그리폰이 당황하잖아요.

1000600805.english: Griffon, you calm down too. We were in the middle of something important! Miss Amy, you said earlier you could help—what kind of help exactly?
1000600805.korean: 그리폰, 너도 좀 진정해. 중요한 이야기 중이었잖아.&n에이미 양? 아까 도움을 준다고 했는데 어떤 도움을 주실 거죠?

1000600806.english: This young lady’s a bit of a killjoy, huh? Well, fine. Hmph… As I said before, I’m a military intelligence unit.
1000600806.korean: 이쪽 아가씨는 좀 재미가 없는 편이네?&n뭐, 좋아요. 흐응… 전 아까 말씀 드렸지만 군사용 첩보 유닛이에요.

1000600807.english: I’m born with basic past terrain data. Naturally, I also know about the nearby area where I was manufactured. We’ll have to locate the facility in secret.
1000600807.korean: 기본적인 과거의 지형 정보는 가지고 태어나게 되요.&n당연히 제조소인 이 근처 정보도 알고 있죠. 비밀리에 부대를 찾아가야 하니.

1000600808.english: Of course. I’ll mark the hydrogen cell storage on the map. If you go there, our darling should be able to get what they need.
1000600808.korean: 물론이에요. 지도에 수소 전기 저장고를 표시해 드릴게요.&n아마, 거기에 가면 우리 자기가 필요한 걸 얻을 수 있을 거예요.

1000600809.english: Got it. Let’s head there, then. Master, I’ll get ready.
1000600809.korean: 알겠어요. 그럼 거기로 한 번 가보죠.&n주인님, 그럼 준비하도록 할게요.

1000600810.english: A storage full of hydrogen cells! I’d say that’s a huge success, right? I didn’t know our darling was this amazing.
1000600810.korean: 가득 찬 수소전지 저장고군요. 이 정도면 대성공이겠죠? &n우리 자기가 이렇게 대단할 줄 몰랐어요.

1000600811.english: Once we get back, I’ll have to give you a reward when it’s just the two of us.
1000600811.korean: 돌아가면 둘이서만 있을 때 꼭 상을 드려야겠어요.

1000600812.english: A—A reward!? What are you planning to do, just the two of you? Human? You hear me!? Say something!
1000600812.korean: 사, 상? 둘이서만 무슨 짓을 하려고?&n인간? 듣고 있지? 말해 봐!

1000600813.english: It’s fine. I’ll handle everything myself. Our darling doesn’t have to know everything.
1000600813.korean: 괜찮아요. 전부 제가 알아서 할 테니. &n우리 자기는 꼭 다 알 필요 없어요.

1000600814.english: From what I saw earlier, most of bioroids are a bit on the conservative side… You must have found it frustrating too, right?
1000600814.korean: 아까 보니 대부분 좀 보수적인 아이들이던데… 자기도 답답하셨죠?

1000600815.english: Not true! We’re totally open-minded! And the human doesn’t get frustrated at all, you know?
1000600815.korean: 아니거든? 우리 완전 개방적인데?&n그리고 인간도 전혀 답답해 하지 않거든?

1000600816.english: Griffon… stop it! You’re just making Miss Amy enjoy herself more.
1000600816.korean: 그리폰… 그만해. 네가 그러니까 에이미 양이 더 재미있어 하는 거잖아.

1000600817.english: And Miss Amy, that’s enough from you too! It’s fine to joke with us, but Master is our leader. Teasing Master is not allowed.
1000600817.korean: 그리고 에이미 양도 그쯤 해 주세요. 저희에게 농담을 하는 건 괜찮지만&n주인님은 우리의 중심이에요. 주인님을 희롱하는 건 안됩니다.

1000600818.english: Oh my? Why twist my sincerity into calling it teasing? Fine. This young lady is a little scary, so…
1000600818.korean: 어머? 왜 내 진심을 희롱이라고 왜곡하는 걸까?&n알았어요. 이쪽 아가씨는 좀 무서우니까…

1000600819.english: Master, now that we’ve secured this much power, as long as we solve the nutrition and parts issues, I think we can expand our forces enough.
1000600819.korean: 주인님, 이제 이만큼의 동력이 확보됐으니 영양 문제와 부품 문제만 해결되면 &n병력을 충분히 늘려도 될 것 같아요.

1000600820.english: As for the nutrition issue… there’s a cryogenic food storage once used by a market not far from here. If it hasn’t been destroyed, how about checking it out?
1000600820.korean: 영양 문제라면… 멀지 않은 곳에 마트에서 사용하던 극저온 식품 보존고가 &n있어요. 파괴되지만 않았다면 거기로 한 번 가보는 게 어때요?

1000600821.english: Then let’s regroup and head there. We’ll return for now, Master.
1000600821.korean: 그럼 재정비 후, 거기로 가보도록 해요.&n그럼 주인님, 일단 귀환할게요.

1000600822.english: The location I showed you is a place with cryogenic storage meant for distributing to various food stores.
1000600822.korean: 일단, 보여드린 지역은 여러 식품 매장으로 보내려고 했던 극저온 저장고가 있는 &n장소예요..

1000600823.english: The others are also very interested in this cryogenic storage.
1000600823.korean: 자매들도 극저온 저장고에 대해서는 관심이 많으니까.

1000600824.english: Miss Griffon in particular seems interested in something called canned tuna. I’m quite curious about how it tastes myself.
1000600824.korean: 특히 그리폰 경은 그 캔참치란 것에 관심을 가지더군.&n나도 어떤 맛일지 상당히 기대가 된다네.

1000600825.english: Miss Amy kept teasing her and she said she’d go on ahead… Ah, was I not supposed to say that?
1000600825.korean: 여기 있는 에이미 양이 자꾸 놀려서 먼저 가 있겠다고…&n아, 이건 말을 하면 안되는 거였던가?

1000600826.english: That girl, honestly… She’s still got a long way to go before she matures. Sorry, Master.
1000600826.korean: 그 아이도 참…&n아직 철이 들려면 멀었네요. 죄송해요. 주인님.

1000600827.english: I see. Maybe I went a bit far yesterday?

1000600828.english: Hmm… last night, you say? Now I’m curious too. Just what happened to make Griffon react so badly…
1000600828.korean: 음… 어젯밤 말인가? 나도 좀 궁금하긴 하군.&n도대체 무슨 일이 있었는지 그리폰이 그리 질색을 하는지…

1000600829.english: Hehe… Who knows? If you’re curious, should we go find out together later?&nNow then, what should I teach you today?
1000600829.korean: 후후… 글쎄요? 혹시 궁금하시면 이따가 함께 찾아가 보도록 할까요?&n오늘은 뭘 가르쳐 줄까나?

1000600830.english: Miss Amy, please restrain yourself. It’s still too soon for Griffon… Sigh… We got a bit sidetracked, so let’s return to the mission.
1000600830.korean: 에이미 양, 자제해 주세요. 그리폰에겐 아직 이르니까… &n휴… 잠깐 이야기가 샜는데 다시 작전 이야기로 돌아가도록 해요.

1000600831.english: First, I’ll give you a brief situation report. This is an area without proper records on the enemy.
1000600831.korean: 일단 간단히 현재 상황 보고부터 드릴게요.&n이 지역은 적 정보가 제대로 기록돼 있지 않은 지역이에요..

1000600832.english: Yes. That’s why your real-time command over comms will be needed, Master… I’m asking you to take real-time command.
1000600832.korean: 네. 그래서 주인님의 실시간 통신 지휘가 필요한 상황이니...&n실시간 지휘를 부탁 드리겠습니다.

1000600833.english: Yes, Master. Then, let’s head out!

1000600835.english: These bioroids have died recently. What happened?
1000600835.korean: 이 바이오로이드들은 최근에 죽은 거군요.&n무슨 일이 있었던 거지?

1000600836.english: For now, we are in the middle of enemy territory, so let's plan to recover the belongings and bodies on the way back and report to headquarters.
1000600836.korean: 일단, 지금은 적진 가운데니 &n조사는 돌아오는 길에 유품과 시신을 회수해서 본부에 가서 하기로 해요.

1000600837.english: ... Right? Yes. Then let's quickly go to the freezer.
1000600837.korean: ... 그래야겠죠?&n네. 그럼 얼른 냉동고로 가도록 하죠

1000600838.english: Whoa!!!! What is all this? I’ve never seen so much tuna before!
1000600838.korean: 우와!!!! 이게 다 뭐야?&n참치? 참치가 이렇게 많은 건 처음 봤어!

1000600839.english: Hoo. Hoo. Hoo. Foolish girl! To lose your reason, enslaved by mere appetite… This noble princess is not swayed by such illusions—such phantasms.
1000600839.korean: 후. 후. 후. 어리석구나 소녀여! 한낱 식욕에 지배 당해 이성을 잃다니… &n이 고귀한 프린세스는 그런 허상 - 판타즘에는 흔들리지 않지.

1000600840.english: Is that so? Fine, then. I’ll just take all of this myself…
1000600840.korean: 그래? 그러시든지. 이건 내가 다 챙길 테니까…

1000600841.english: Huh?? What are you talking about? There’s no way your tiny body could carry all this.
1000600841.korean: 어?? 무슨 소리냐? &n너의 작은 몸으로 다 들고 갈 수 있을 리 없지 않느냐?

1000600842.english: I can carry it all! I’ll just ask Johanna for help. The tuna will only be shared with the less noble people who helped!
1000600842.korean: 다 들고 갈 수 있거든? 요안나한테 부탁하면 되지?&n참치는 도와준 사람들하고만 나눠 먹어야지~!

1000600843.english: Eh? No way! I want some too! You’re not really going to eat it all yourself, right? You’ll share, won’t you?
1000600843.korean: 엉? 안돼! 나도, 나도 먹을 거야!&n정말 너 혼자만 먹을 건 아니지? 응? 나눠 줄 거지?

1000600844.english: Really~? Didn't you say you weren't interested because you're a noble princess?
1000600844.korean: 글쎄? 넌 고귀한 프린세스라서 관심 없지 않았냐?

1000600845.english: Y-you… Then I’ll call Amy! She told me to call her if you start bullying me!
1000600845.korean: 너… 너… 그러면 에이미 부를 거야!&n에이미가 네가 괴롭히면 부르랬으니까.

1000600846.english: W-what are you talking about? Ha ha. There’s no way Amy would say something like that…
1000600846.korean: 무, 무슨 소리야? 하하. 에이미 걔가 그런 말을 했을 리가…

1000600850.english: Griffon keeps teasing me… and doesn’t want to give me anything…
1000600850.korean: 자꾸 그리폰이 놀리고… 나한텐 아무 것도 안 주려고 하고…

1000600852.english: Heh… foolish little creature… Looks like she ran away in fear of me after all.
1000600852.korean: 후후… 어리석은 미물 같으니… &n결국 이 몸이 두려워 도망을 간 모양이군.

1000600853.english: Now now… Princess, just being passive when you're being bullied won't solve anything, you know? Tonight, you should teach griffon a lesson…
1000600853.korean: 정말… 우리 공주님, 괴롭힌다고 괴롭힘을 당해주면 안돼요.&n오늘 밤엔 그리폰을 더 잘 가르쳐 줘야… 응? 이 신호 간섭은…

1000600854.english: Can you hear me? I sincerely hope you can hear me. Bio-roids receiving this communication, please remember what I am about to say from now on.
1000600854.korean: 들리나요? 부디 들리길 바래요.&n이 통신을 받은 바이오로이드는 이제부터 제가 하는 말을 기억해 주세요.

1000600855.english: Huh? What is this sound? Who? Who is it?
1000600855.korean: 어? 이게 무슨 소리야?&n누구냐? 누구인 것이냐?

1000600856.english: Shh! This is a one-way communication. Wait a moment, Princess, be quiet… You need to listen to this.
1000600856.korean: 쉿! 이거 일방향 통신이에요.&n잠깐만, 프린세스, 조용히… 이걸 들어야 해요.

1000600857.english: Please deliver this to the last human. An important Bioroid is on her way for the mission he is about to accomplish.
1000600857.korean: 마지막 인간에게 전해 주세요. &n지금 그가 이룰 사명을 위해 중요한 바이오로이드가 가고 있어요.

1000600858.english: We must save her. &nIf you save her, it will be of great help to the fate of the last human being who will raise humans.
1000600858.korean: 그녀를 구해야 해요. &n그녀를 구한다면 인간을 일으킬 마지막 인간의 운명에 큰 도움이 될 거에요.

1000600859.english: I am sending the coordinates. Right now… the unit is deploying to capture her…
1000600859.korean: 그 좌표를 보냅니다.&n지금… 그녀를 잡으러 부대가 출… 발….

1000600860.english: What? Who would do this to us… Anyway, if it's the last human… we just need to give it to the familiars.
1000600860.korean: 뭐야? 누가 우리한테 왜 이런걸…&n어쨌든 마지막 인간이면… 권속에게 전해주면 되는 거잖아.

1000600861.english: This is an important matter. There are things we definitely need to inform ourselves about… and I think we should give it some thought too.
1000600861.korean: 이건, 중요한 일이네요. 우리 자기에게 꼭 알려야 하는 것도 있고…&n우리도 생각을 해봐야 할 것 같아요.

1000600863.english: LRL, didn't you feel it? The feeling that you must listen to her words. This irresistible feeling.
1000600863.korean: LRL, 느끼지 못했나요? 그녀의 말을 반드시 들어야 할 것 같은 기분.&n거부할 수 없는 이 느낌.

1000600865.english: This feeling of an absolute command. Although something is coming to mind... I think I should go back and look for more information for now.
1000600865.korean: 이 절대적인 명령의 느낌. 짚이는 게 있긴 하지만…&n일단은 돌아가서 자료를 좀 더 찾아봐야 할 것 같네요.

1000600866.english: … She didn’t look like a bioroid at all. Besides, she’s a woman. Hehe… Constantia must be in a difficult situation, too?
1000600866.korean: … 아무래도 바이오로이드론 보이지 않더군요. 게다가 여자.&n후후… 콘스탄챠도 난감하겠네요?

1000600867.english: Is there anything to be perplexed about? Wouldn't it really be better if even one more human remained?
1000600867.korean: 난감할 게 있나요? &n정말로 인간이 한 분이라도 더 남았으면 더 좋은 것 아니겠어요?

1000600868.english: Oh my, really? You're a human too... Wouldn't you be more interested in a person than a bioroid?
1000600868.korean: 어머나, 정말요? 우리 자기도 사람인데…&n바이오로이드 보다는 사람한테 더 관심이 많이 가지 않겠어요?

1000600869.english: Nothing is certain yet. And if you look at it that way, isn't Amy in a difficult position too?
1000600869.korean: 아직 확실한 건 아무 것도 없어요.&n그리고 그렇게 따지면 에이미 양도 난감한 거 아닌가요?

1000600870.english: Well, I wonder if that's really the case? To be honest, I'm not the type to dwell on my position...
1000600870.korean: 글쎄요? 정말 그럴까요?&n전 사실 위치에 연연하는 타입은 아니라서…

1000600871.english: Does he not know? Is he pretending not to know? If he doesn't want to, I'll stop talking about this. Anyway, the communication said to save her, so I think it would be best to make a move for now...
1000600871.korean: 모르는 걸까? 모르는 척 하는 걸까? 자기가 싫다면 이 이야긴 그만 둘게요. &n어쨌든 통신에선 그녀를 구하라고 했으니 일단 움직이는 게 좋을 것 같은데...

1000600872.english: She… who is she talking about? Could she be talking about a bioroid?
1000600872.korean: 그녀… 누굴 말하는 걸까요?&n혹시 바이오로이드를 말하는 걸까요?

1000600873.english: Well, I don't know, right? Anyway, I think I'll only know once I actually move... For now, the location you sent me is around here.
1000600873.korean: 그야 모르죠? 어쨌든 움직여 봐야 알 수 있을 것 같으니까…&n일단 보내준 위치는 이 근처예요.

1000600875.english: Huh? Do you know this place?

1000600876.english: Yes, this is where our bioroids used to briefly serve as a base. It was easy to procure parts because there were many ironworks nearby.
1000600876.korean: 네, 여긴 이전에 우리 바이오로이드들이 잠깐 기지로 삼았던 곳이에요.&n철공소가 근처에 많아서 부품 수급하기가 쉬웠거든요.

1000600877.english: That’s good. Even if the search fails, we’ll be able to secure the metal parts. My dear, what should we do? Shall we start searching here?
1000600877.korean: 잘 됐네요. 수색에 실패해도 금속 부품을 수급할 수 있을 테니.&n우리 자기, 어떻게 할까요? 여기부터 수색해 볼까요?

1000600878.english: Yes, then I will prepare for the match. I ask you to take command.
1000600878.korean: 네, 그럼 출전 준비를 할게요.&n지휘를 부탁 드립니다.

1000600879.english: Phew!!! I was so surprised when the Iron Bugs suddenly popped out!

1000600880.english: Right. Seeing you speak so normally, I can tell you were surprised.
1000600880.korean: 그래. 네가 평범하게 말하는 걸 보니 놀란 걸 알겠다.

1000600882.english: Hahaha... To think they fell for my acting... I guess ordinary people are just hopeless, aren't they?
1000600882.korean: 크크크… 나의 인간 연기에 속다니…&n역시 평범한 자들은 어쩔 수 없는 건가?

1000600883.english: It's no use doing that now, you know?

1000600884.english: Well... I suppose that's all you can see.
1000600884.korean: 하긴… 너의 눈에는 그 정도만 보이겠지.

1000600886.english: Just try hitting me! I'm going to call Amy right now!
1000600886.korean: 때리기만 해봐! 당장 에이미 부를 거야!

1000600887.english: Go ahead and try. She's already back in the submarine, you know? This girl got all high and mighty just because I took her side...
1000600887.korean: 그래 보시든지. 걔는 벌써 잠수함으로 돌아갔거든?&n요게 그 계집애가 편 좀 들어준다고 기가 살아서는…

1000600888.english: Ugh… Just you wait! A massive darkness will soon engulf you!! The regret of that day… Argh!!!
1000600888.korean: 으윽… 두고 보자! 곧 거대한 어둠이 널 덮칠지니!!&n그날의 후회함이… 으악!!!

1000600889.english: If you get caught, you're dead!

1000600890.english: Phew... Griffon, stop it. You know LRL isn't doing this out of malice. More importantly, could you raise the interception frequency a bit? Just in case a signal is being picked up...
