1000600890.korean: 휴… 그리폰, 그만하렴. LRL이 악의가 있어서 그러는 건 아닌 거 알잖니.&n그것보다 감청 주파수 좀 높여줄래? 혹시라도 신호가 잡히는 게…

1000600892.english: Wow! I caught it in one shot! Just a moment, I'll connect!
1000600892.korean: 우와! 한 방에 잡혔어!&n잠깐만 통신 연결할게!

1000600893.english: While establishing communication, please respond if there are any Bioroid units available to communicate!
1000600893.korean: 통신 연결 중, 통신 가능한 바이오로이드 부대가 있으면 응답해 주세요!

1000600894.english: This is 21st Squad. Please identify your squad or platoon.
1000600894.korean: 여기는 21스쿼드. 소속 스쿼드나 소대를 밝혀 주세요.

1000600895.english: Ah! Squad 21! This is Coco Mercury from Unit 1, Squad 1! Is that you, Constantia Onee-chan?
1000600895.korean: 아! 21스쿼드! 여긴 1부대 1스쿼드 소속 코코 머큐리에요!&n혹시 콘스탄챠 언니인가요?

1000600896.english: Ah, Coco! But why can't I see your face? Is the camera broken?
1000600896.korean: 아, 코코! 그런데 왜 얼굴이 안 보이는 거니?&n혹시 카메라가 고장난 거니?

1000600897.english: Huh? Ah! Just a moment… The camera’s a bit high up…
1000600897.korean: 네? 아! 잠시만요…&n카메라가 좀 높이 있네요…

1000600898.english: Onee-chan! I didn’t expect to connect with you on random comms! This is such a relief.
1000600898.korean: 언니! 랜덤 통신에서 언니가 연결될 줄은 몰랐어요!&n정말 다행이에요.

1000600899.english: Right. That's a relief. What happened? I heard the news that headquarters was attacked, but...
1000600899.korean: 그래. 다행이야. 어떻게 된 거니? 본부가 공격을 받았단 소식은 들었지만…

1000600900.english: Well… our unit was in charge of the last rear guard… and ended up getting chased, so we ended up here.
1000600900.korean: 그게… 우리 부대가 마지막 후위를 맡았다가…&n계속 쫓기게 되서 여기까지 왔어요.

1000600901.english: So? What about the other sisters? What happened to them?

1000600902.english: I kept getting chased here too, and ended up in an underground passage, but eventually we ran into each other... Somehow Captain Marie agreed to hold the rear, so I came out to deliver the news first.
1000600902.korean: 여기서도 계속 쫓기다가 지하도에 들어왔는데 결국은 맞닥뜨려서... &n어찌어찌 마리 대장이 뒤를 막기로 하고 제가 일단 소식을 전하러 나왔어요.

1000600903.english: Captain Marie... Okay, Coco. Can you possibly send your current location? We'll come to you first.
1000600903.korean: 마리 대장님이… 알았어. 코코. 혹시 지금 위치 보낼 수 있니?&n일단 너한테 우리가 갈게.

1000600904.english: Yes! I’ll send the coordinates ahead of time. Onee-chan, please hurry!
1000600904.korean: 네! 일단 좌표는 미리 보내 놓을 게요.&n언니, 빨리 오세요.

1000600905.english: Got it. Just wait a bit. We’ll be there soon!
1000600905.korean: 알았어. 조금만 기다리렴. 금방 갈 테니.

1000600906.english: For now, it's quiet near here. Nothing but a few Iron Bugs...
1000600906.korean: 일단, 이 지역 근처는 조용해.&n철충 몇 마리 외엔 아무 것도…

1000600908.english: It sounds like an Iron Bug... I've never heard a sound like that before. It sounds like it's screaming...
1000600908.korean: 철충 소리 같은데… 저런 소리는 한 번도 들어본 적 없어.&n마치 비명이라도 지르고 있는 것처럼…

1000600909.english: Oh my! Honey, are you listening? I was so surprised... Today, your arms...
1000600909.korean: 어머! 자기, 듣고 있나요?&n저 너무 놀라서… 오늘은 자기 품이…

1000600910.english: Don't even think about pulling a stunt. It's not really that loud...
1000600910.korean: 너 수작 부릴 생각 하지마.&n별로 큰 소리도 아니구만…

1000600911.english: Anyway, that sound is from far away... so it didn't happen nearby. It is strange, so I will try long-range detection, but...
1000600911.korean: 어쨌든 저 소리는 머니까... 이 근처에서 벌어진 일은 아냐. &n이상하긴 하니까 원거리 감지는 해보겠지만…

1000600912.english: Huh? What? There were definitely over 10 reactions... Why?
1000600912.korean: 어? 뭐야? 반응이 분명히 10개가 넘었는데… 어째서?

1000600913.english: What is the matter? Have the iron bugs increased?

1000600914.english: No. The number has decreased. There were definitely quite a few Iron蟲 over there...
1000600914.korean: 아니. 줄었어. 분명히 저쪽에 철충이 제법 있었는데…

1000600915.english: You're saying it decreased? That's strange. We shouldn't be the only organization operating around here. I heard the records say that even the AGS in this area were annihilated.
1000600915.korean: 줄었다고요? 이상하네요. 이 근처에서 활동하는 조직은 우리 밖에 없을 텐데?&n기록에는 이 근처 AGS도 궤멸되었다고 들었어요.

1000600916.english: Yeah. But… it… it’s dropped to one. It’s true that the Iron蟲 reaction has disappeared. Why? And that single reaction has gotten ridiculously big.
1000600916.korean: 응. 근데… 하나… 하나로 줄었어. 철충 반응이 사라진 게 맞아.&n어째서지? 그리고 그 하나의 반응이 말도 안 되게 커졌어.

1000600917.english: What about the distance? How far is it from our destination? We should be prepared if there is a possibility of meeting.
1000600917.korean: 거리는? 우리 목적지하고 거리는 어떻게 돼?&n만약 만날 가능성이 있다면 대비를 해야 할 테니까.

1000600918.english: The direction is opposite. And the reaction itself is moving further away. That's strange...
1000600918.korean: 방향은 반대야. 그리고 반응 자체는 멀어지고 있고.&n이상하네…

1000600919.english: Well then, let's go with our goal for now. I think it would be best to discuss this matter later.
1000600919.korean: 그럼, 일단은 우리 목표로 가자. &n이 일은 그 다음에 의논하는 게 좋을 것 같아.

1000600920.english: Everything around here is cleared up, right?
1000600920.korean: 이 근처는 모두 정리가 된 거지?

1000600921.english: Yeah. I think we can start communicating now. Coco is probably nearby, too... but she's likely hiding her signal for now.
1000600921.korean: 응. 이제 통신을 시작해도 될 것 같아.&n아마 코코도 가까이 있을 것 같긴 한데… 지금은 신호를 숨기고 있을 테니까.

1000600922.english: I'll check if there is any communication being picked up first.

1000600923.english: Constantia, could you take a look at this for a moment? There's a completely broken spot over there.
1000600923.korean: 콘스탄챠, 잠깐만 이걸 봐줄래요?  &n저기 완전히 부서진 곳이 있네요.

1000600924.english: This place… isn’t where it was originally broken.
1000600924.korean: 여긴… 원래 부서져 있던 장소는 아니군요.

1000600925.english: Yes. The color of the cross-section of the broken part is completely different. That means not much time has passed. A day? Two days? It broke about that long ago.
1000600925.korean: 네. 부서진 곳 단면의 색깔이 완전히 달라요. 시간이 얼마 지나지 않았단 거죠.&n하루? 이틀? 그 정도 전에 부서진 거예요.

1000600926.english: Was there a fight or something? It looks like this kind of mark would appear if the White Shell Coco is riding used its power.
1000600926.korean: 싸움이라도 있었던 걸까?&n코코가 타고 있는 화이트셸이 힘을 쓰면 이 정도 흔적이 나올 것 같기도 한데?

1000600927.english: That could be... I think I'll only know for sure once I meet Coco. Griffon, you still can't pick up Coco's signal, right?
1000600927.korean: 그럴 수도… 코코를 만나봐야 알 것 같아요.&n그리폰, 아직 코코의 신호는 안 잡히는 거지?

1000600928.english: Yeah. There are no signals. Have I left this area? Or…
1000600928.korean: 응. 신호가 없어. 이 근처를 벗어난 건가?&n아니면…

1000600929.english: Wait a minute. What is that white metal plate? It doesn't look like an Iron Bug.
1000600929.korean: 잠깐만요. 저 하얀 철판은 뭐죠? 철충은 아닌 것 같은데?

1000600930.english: This is a piece of White Shell's glove. White Shell encountered an enemy here.
1000600930.korean: 이건, 화이트 쉘의 장갑 조각.&n여기서 화이트 쉘이 적을 만났었어요.

1000600931.english: For White Shell's armor to break, it would mean it took quite a lot of attacks...
1000600931.korean: 화이트 쉘의 장갑이 부서지려면 &n꽤 많은 수의 공격을 받았단 말인데…

1000600932.english: Considering that, aren't there too few traces? There should be footprints or bullet impact marks from different angles... something like that.
1000600932.korean: 그런 것 치곤 흔적이 너무 적지 않나요? 철충들이 발자국이라든가… &n각기 다른 각도의 탄입 자국이라든가… 그런 게 있어야 할 텐데?

1000600933.english: All that remains are a few small, deep footprints over there. That means…
1000600933.korean: 남은 건 저기 있는 작고 깊은 발자국 몇 개 뿐이군요.&n그 말은…

1000600934.english: So you mean a large Iron Bug, big enough to fight on equal footing with White Shell, attacked, and they fought one-on-one?
1000600934.korean: 화이트 쉘과 대등하게 싸울 정도로 큰 철충이 습격해 1:1로 싸웠단 거겠죠?

1000600935.english: That's ridiculous. If it's an Iron蟲 capable of fighting White Shell one-on-one... it would have to be at least a mid-level or higher... but nothing like that was detected.
1000600935.korean: 말도 안돼. 화이트 쉘과 1:1로 싸울 철충이라면…&n적어도 중위급 이상의 철충일 텐데… 그런 건 감지되지 않았다고.

1000600936.english: Let's follow the tracks for now. Once we find Coco, we'll know exactly what happened.
1000600936.korean: 일단 흔적을 쫓아가 보자. &n코코를 찾으면 어떻게 된 일인지 확실히 알게 될 테니.

1000600937.english: Is this… is it a human's factory? How is it operating?
1000600937.korean: 이건… 인간의 공장이 아닌가.&n어떻게 가동이 되고 있는 것이지?

1000600938.english: ara･･････ufufu. We've strayed quite far from when human used it, haven't we? I wonder what to do. I didn't know the iron insects were capable of production rather than parasitism…
1000600938.korean: 후후. 인간의 형태에서 꽤나 멀어지긴 했지만 말이에요.&n어쩌려나? 철충들이 기생이 아닌 생산을 할 줄은 몰랐는데…

1000600939.english: 'Using the human factory' means... it implies that they know how to use human technology…
1000600939.korean: 인간의 공장을 쓴다는 말은…&n그들이 인간의 기술을 쓸 줄 안다는 이야기인데…

1000600940.english: This is not something to be taken lightly. Do you know where Lady Constantia is?
1000600940.korean: 이건, 쉽게 생각할 일이 아니군.&nLRL, 콘스탄챠 경이 어디 있는지 아는가?

1000600941.english: Huh? Constantia just said that she needs to pick up some kind of signal with the griffon? She hasn't come inside.
1000600941.korean: 응? 콘스탄챠는 그리폰이랑 같이 무슨 신호를 잡아야 한다고 밖에 있는데?&n안에 안 들어왔어.

1000600942.english: Is that so? I'll go inform Lord Constantia about this for now. She needs to see this too...
1000600942.korean: 그런가? 일단 이건 콘스탄챠 경에게 알리고 오겠네.&n그녀도 이건 봐야 하니…

1000600943.english: Heh. Heh. Heh. As expected… have they managed to access the Akashic Records too? It's going to be a tough fight.
1000600943.korean: 크.크.크. 역시… 그 녀석들까지 아카식 레코드 접속에 성공한 것인가?&n쉽지 않은 싸움이 되겠군.

1000600944.english: Phew... Princess? Playing is fun, but for now, it's best to avoid laughing that loudly. After all, we are keeping an eye on our surroundings.
1000600944.korean: 휴… 공주님? 놀이도 좋지만 일단 그렇게 크게 웃는 건 피하는 게 좋아요.&n일단은 우린 주위를 경계하는 거니까요.

1000600945.english: Yeah. Got it. I just have to make sure I don't make any noise, right?
1000600945.korean: 응. 알았어. 소리만 안 내면 되는 거지?

1000600946.english: Of course. But it is strange that there are no Iron蟲s even though there is a factory. There must be troops guarding even an automated factory… Oh my!
1000600946.korean: 물론이죠. 그런데 공장이 있는데도 철충들이 없는 건 이상하군요.&n자동 공장이라도 지키는 병력은 있을 텐데… 어머!

1000600947.english: That is the sound of that monster from back then. Go and tell everyone. The battle will begin soon.
1000600947.korean: 이 소리는 그때 그 괴물의 소리군요.&nLRL, 가서 모두에게 전하세요. 곧, 전투가 시작될 테니.

1000600948.english: Phew, the signal’s still not coming through?
1000600948.korean: 휴, 아직 신호가 잡히지 않는 거니?

1000600949.english: Don’t tell me… Coco, nothing’s gone wrong, right?… Hm? What’s that sound?
1000600949.korean: 설마… 코코, 잘못된 건 아니겠지?&n… 응? 이 소리는?

1000600950.english: Coco! I think we’ve got the signal! Hold on a sec…
1000600950.korean: 코코야! 신호가 잡힌 것 같은데? 잠시만…

1000600951.english: Ah! It’s connected! Constantia? Is that you?

1000600952.english: Coco? Where are you right now? Nothing’s wrong, is it?
1000600952.korean: 코코? 지금 어디 있니?&n혹시 잘못된 건 아니지?

1000600953.english: No. I got chased for a bit, but I’m fine. Right now I’m… huh? Onee-chan, are you inside the factory right now?
1000600953.korean: 네. 일단 쫓기긴 했지만 무사해요.&n지금 위치가… 응? 언니 지금 공장 안에 들어와 있어요?

1000600954.english: I am. But how did you know?

1000600955.english: Hehe. Just a second. I’ll come out.

1000600958.english: Whoa! What the—? Why are you coming out from underneath?
1000600958.korean: 깜짝야! 뭐야? 뭐야? 왜 밑에서 나오는 거야?

1000600959.english: Hehe. I was hiding under this conveyor belt.
1000600959.korean: 헤헤. 여기 컨베이어 벨트 밑에 숨어 있었거든요?

1000600960.english: And what about that white robot?

1000600961.english: Oh… White Shell’s stashed inside that wall for now. If the Metal Parasites are after it, then don’t worry.
1000600961.korean: 응… 화이트 쉘은 일단 저기 벽 속에 숨겨놨어요.&n혹시 철충이 노리는 것 때문이라면 안심하세요.

1000600962.english: White Shell doesn’t have any internal circuits, so the Metal Parasites aren’t that interested in it. They can only parasitize things that have circuits, after all.
1000600962.korean: 화이트 쉘은 내부에 회로가 없어서 철충이 그다지 관심을 가지지 않거든요?&n철충은 회로가 있어야 기생할 수 있으니까요.

1000600963.english: But suddenly… that weird thing showed up, scared me half to death… But it tried to eat the Metal Parasites before it went after me, so I survived.
1000600963.korean: 갑자기… 그 이상한 녀석이 와서 얼마나 놀랬는지…&n그래도 그 녀석이 저보다 철충을 먼저 먹으려고 해서 살았어요.

1000600964.english: Ah! Right. What is that thing? It’s a Metal Parasite, right? Why would a Metal Parasite eat one another!?
1000600964.korean: 아! 그래. 그 자식은 뭐야?&n철충 맞지? 왜 철충이 철충을 먹는 거야?

1000600965.english: Who knows? That’s the first time I’ve seen one like that, so I’m not… hehe… I’ve never seen one like that either… Ah! That’s right! I need to tell you about Captain Marie…
1000600965.korean: 글쎄요? 그건 처음 본 철충이라서 잘… 헤헤… &n저도 그런 애는 처음 봐서… 아! 맞다! 마리 대장 이야기를 해야 하는데…

1000600966.english: Oh! That’s right! Captain Marie said she’d cover the rear. Is she safe right now?
1000600966.korean: 아! 맞어! 마리 대장님이 뒤를 맡았다고 했잖아. &n지금 마리 대장님은 무사한 거야?

1000600967.english: I can’t get through to her either. Still, she’s Captain Marie, so she wouldn’t go down to a Metal Parasite! But just in case, I think we’d better hurry and go rescue her.
1000600967.korean: 저도 통신이 안돼요. 그래도 마리 대장님이니까 철충한테 당하진 않겠지만요.&n그래도 혹시 모르니 빨리 구해 드리러 가야 할 것 같아요.

1000600968.english: I see. Let’s return to base for now. We should report to Master and think of a way to rescue Captain Marie.
1000600968.korean: 그렇구나. 일단 기지로 돌아가자. 주인님께 보고하고 &n마리 대장님을 구할 방법을 생각해 봐야지.

1000600969.english: And we also need to report on Predator’s whereabouts.
1000600969.korean: 프레데터의 행방에 대해서도 보고를 드려야 하니 말이야.

1000600970.english: I think I'll leave the report here for now. The immediate problem is rescuing Captain Marie and finding out the identity of that strange Metal Parasite.
1000600970.korean: 일단 보고는 여기까지 드리면 될 것 같아요.&n지금 당면한 문제는 마리 대장을 구하는 것과 그 이상한 철충의 정체예요.

1000600971.english: Captain Marie… She must be struggling a lot right now… and she doesn’t even have all her old strength anymore…
1000600971.korean: 마리 대장님… 지금 많이 힘드실 텐데… 옛날 그 힘을 온전히 가진 것도 아니고…

1000600972.english: Huh? That's strange? According to the data I have... It seems like someone with the ability of Captain Marie would be able to break through on their own, right?
1000600972.korean: 응? 이상하네요? 제가 가진 데이터대로라면…&n마리 대장 정도의 능력이면 충분히 단독 돌파도 가능할 것 같은데요?

1000600973.english: But, Captain, she’s lost a lot of strength compared to before. More than half of the satellites she could use have been destroyed.
1000600973.korean: 하지만, 대장님. 옛날하고 다르게 힘을 많이 잃으셨으니까요.&n쓸 수 있는 위성도 반 넘게 파괴되었고.

1000600974.english: Captain Marie is a captain! She's so cool! &n Now, the number of Bioroids has decreased significantly, so she's only serving as a vice-captain.
1000600974.korean: 마리 대장님은 대장님이에요! 엄청 멋져요!&n지금은 바이오로이드가 많이 줄어 들어서 부대장만 맡고 계시지만요.

1000600975.english: Back in the day, she had tons of subordinates. She always won in battles, too…
1000600975.korean: 옛날에는 부하들이 엄청 많았거든요.&n전쟁에서도 항상 이기셨고…

1000600976.english: Model name [c][ffd130]Indomitable Marie[-][/c] is a &n commander model produced by Black River, a company that manufactures military products.
1000600976.korean: 모델 명 [c][ffd130]불굴의 마리[-][/c]는 군용 제품을 만드는 회사 블랙 리버에서 생산한 &n지휘관 모델이에요.

1000600977.english: Since only a very small number were made, there is currently only one left, but she is very powerful and an expert in combat, so we must definitely rescue her.
1000600977.korean: 워낙 적은 수만 생산돼서 지금 남아 있는 건 한 분 뿐이지만&n강력한 분이시기도 하고 전투에 관해서도 전문가니까 꼭 구해내야 해요.

1000600978.english: If she joins, our power will definitely increase.
1000600978.korean: 그 분만 합류하면 우리 전력이 확실히 강해질 거예요.

1000600979.english: Coco, could you tell me the place where you parted ways with Captain Marie?
1000600979.korean: 코코, 혹시 마리 대장님과 헤어진 장소를 가르쳐 줄 수 있니?

1000600980.english: Captain Marie decided on a place based on the terrain. She thought we could defend it for a long time…
1000600980.korean: 마리 대장님이 지형을 보고 결정한 곳이 있긴 해요.&n여기선 오랫동안 방어를 할 수 있을 거라고…

1000600981.english: Well then, just tell me the way.

1000600982.english: Yes! Then I'll mark it on the map.

1000600983.english: Um... Captain? Human? What should I call you? &n Since Captain is Captain Marie... Ah! Can I call you Commander-in-Chief?
1000600983.korean: 음… 대장님? 인간님? 뭐라고 부르면 되죠?&n대장님은 마리 대장이니까… 아! 총사령관님이라고 부르면 될까요?

1000600984.english: Yep! Then I’ll tell you the way! Commander! I look forward to working with you!
1000600984.korean: 넵! 그럼 가는 길을 알려 드릴게요! 사령관님! 앞으로 잘 부탁 드려요!

1000600985.english: Phew... You somehow managed to break through? That's a relief. It seems there are fewer Metal Parasites than expected.
1000600985.korean: 휴… 어떻게든 돌파했네?&n다행이야. 철충이 예상보다는 적은 것 같아서.

1000600986.english: Captain Marie is just down this road, right?
1000600986.korean: 마리 대장님은 이 길로 쭉가면 있는 거지?

1000600987.english: Yes! The captain said she'd hold out there until I got back!
1000600987.korean: 넵! 대장님은 거기서 내가 올때까지 버틴다고 했어요!

1000600988.english: …Constantia, don't you think it's strange? There are definitely fewer Metal Parasites than last time I was here. I think it's best to move cautiously.
1000600988.korean: … 콘스탄챠, 이상하지 않아요? 저번에 왔을 때보다 확실히 철충이 적어요.&n아무래도 신중하게 움직이는 게 좋을 것 같아요.

1000600989.english: No. Maybe even the Metal Parasite here have gone towards Captain Marie. We'd better hurry.
1000600989.korean: 아니에요. 어쩌면 여기 철충들까지 마리 대장님 쪽으로 갔을 지도 몰라요.&n서두르는 게 좋겠어요.

1000600990.english: Not because of that, but because of that monster. &n I think a monster that eats Metal Parasites would have followed this path.
1000600990.korean: 그것 때문이 아니라 그 괴물 말이에요.&n철충을 잡아 먹는 괴물이 이 길을 따라 갔을 것 같아서요.

1000600991.english: Ah! What should I do? That monster couldn't even withstand the White Shell...
1000600991.korean: 아! 어떡하죠? 그 괴물은 화이트 쉘로도 어떻게 버틸 수가 없었는데…

1000600992.english: So, we have to go even further. The monster might be after the captain.
1000600992.korean: 그러니 더더욱 가야 해요. 괴물이 대장님을 노릴 수도 있으니까.

1000600993.english: And… since that monster seems to be after the Metal Parasites… &n If you're lucky, you might even get a fisherman's talisman.
1000600993.korean: 그리고… 일단 그 괴물은 철충을 노리는 것 같으니…&n운이 좋다면 어부지리를 얻을 수도 있겠죠.

1000600994.english: If that's true, we'll have time to prepare. We're almost out of ammo. And now that the entry route is secured, re-entry shouldn't take long.
1000600994.korean: 그 말대로라면 준비를 할 시간이 있을 거에요. 탄환도 거의 떨어졌고요.&n진입로가 확보가 되었으니 재진입에 오래 걸리진 않잖아요.

1000600995.english: …Okay. &n Let's finish resupplying and then go out again.
1000600995.korean: … 좋아요. &n일단 보급만 마치고 바로 다시 출격하는 걸로 하죠.

1000600996.english: Captain… Will you be able to hold out until then?

1000600997.english: Don't worry. If you're the master of the data I have... &n Even if you're a little weaker, you'll have no problem holding on.
1000600997.korean: 걱정 말아요. 제가 가진 데이터의 대장님이라면…&n좀 약해지셨다 한들 버티는 건 문제가 없을 거예요.

1000600998.english: Clearly, she's the type that becomes stronger in a crisis. That's why she's the indomitable Marie, right?
1000600998.korean: 분명히, 위기에서 더 강해지는 타입. 그래서 불굴의 마리잖아요?

1000600999.english: Okay, now let's begin the operation.

1000601000.english: The objective of the operation is to break through the passage and rescue Captain Marie.
1000601000.korean: 작전 목표는 통로 안쪽을 돌파해서 마리 대장님을 구하는 것.

1000601001.english: And after rescuing Captain Marie, return to the base with as little losses as possible.
1000601001.korean: 그리고, 마리 대장님을 구한 후에 최대한 손실 없이 기지로 돌아가는 거야.

1000601002.english: I’ll lead the way here. With White Shell’s durability, I should be able to protect the others in such a narrow battlefield like the tunnel.
1000601002.korean: 여기선 제가 앞장 설게요. 화이트 쉘의 내구성이면 통로처럼 좁은 전장에선 &n충분히 다른 동료들을 보호할 수 있을 거예요.

1000601003.english: Okay. Griffon, take charge of the detection. &n First, there's that unidentified Metal Parasite, so we need to find it first.
1000601003.korean: 좋아. 그리폰, 탐지를 맡아줘. &n일단은 그 정체불명의 철충이 있으니 우리가 먼저 발견을 해야해.

1000601004.english: Leave it to me. I’ll make sure to confirm if that thing is coming!
1000601004.korean: 맡겨줘. 그 녀석이 오는지는 확실하게 알아볼 테니까.

1000601005.english: Good. Then let’s go, we’re rescuing Captain Marie!
1000601005.korean: 좋아. 그럼 출발하자.&n마리 대장님을 구하는 거야.

1000601006.english: If Captain Marie is here… &n I can give wings to Master.
1000601006.korean: 마리 대장님이 있다면…&n주인님께 날개를 달아줄 수 있을 거야.

1000601007.english: What? What? That guy… ran away? Did we really win?
1000601007.korean: 뭐야? 뭐야? 저 녀석… &n도망 갔는데? 우리가 이긴 거 맞아?
